title: Search, Do not Guess: Teaching Small Language Models to Be Effective Search Agents
authors: Yizhou Liu, Qi Sun, Yulin Chen, Siyue Zhang, Chen Zhao
abstract: Agents equipped with search tools have emerged as effective solutions for knowledge-intensive tasks. While Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, their high computational cost limits practical deployment for search agents. Consequently, recent work has focused on distilling agentic behaviors from LLMs into Small Language Models (SLMs). Through comprehensive evaluation on complex multi-hop reasoning tasks, we find that despite possessing less parametric knowledge, SLMs invoke search tools less frequently and are more prone to hallucinations. To address this issue, we propose \policy, a lightweight fine-tuning approach that explicitly trains SLMs to reliably retrieve and generate answers grounded in retrieved evidence. Compared to agent distillation from LLMs, our approach improves performance by 17.3 scores on Bamboogle and 15.3 scores on HotpotQA, achieving LLM-level results across benchmarks. Our further analysis reveals that adaptive search strategies in SLMs often degrade performance, highlighting the necessity of consistent search behavior for reliable reasoning.
title_zh: 搜索，不要猜测：如何教导小型语言模型成为高效的搜索代理
abstract_zh: 配备搜索工具的智能体已成为解决知识密集型任务的有效方案。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）具备强大的推理能力，但其高昂的计算成本限制了其在搜索智能体中的实际部署。因此，近期研究致力于将LLMs中的智能体行为提炼并迁移至小型语言模型（SLMs）。通过在复杂的多跳推理任务上进行综合评估，我们发现，尽管SLMs的参数化知识较少，但它们调用搜索工具的频率更低，且更容易产生幻觉。为解决这一问题，我们提出 \policy，一种轻量级微调方法，通过显式训练SLMs以可靠地检索并基于检索到的证据生成答案。与从LLMs中进行智能体蒸馏的方法相比，我们的方法在Bamboogle数据集上提升了17.3分，在HotpotQA数据集上提升了15.3分，实现了与LLM相当的基准性能。进一步分析表明，SLMs中自适应的搜索策略往往导致性能下降，凸显了保持一致搜索行为对于可靠推理的重要性。

title: Memory Intelligence Agent
authors: Jingyang Qiao, Weicheng Meng, Yu Cheng, Zhihang Lin, Zhizhong Zhang, Xin Tan, Jingyu Gong, Kun Shao, Yuan Xie
abstract: Deep research agents (DRAs) integrate LLM reasoning with external tools. Memory systems enable DRAs to leverage historical experiences, which are essential for efficient reasoning and autonomous evolution. Existing methods rely on retrieving similar trajectories from memory to aid reasoning, while suffering from key limitations of ineffective memory evolution and increasing storage and retrieval costs. To address these problems, we propose a novel Memory Intelligence Agent (MIA) framework, consisting of a Manager-Planner-Executor architecture. Memory Manager is a non-parametric memory system that can store compressed historical search trajectories. Planner is a parametric memory agent that can produce search plans for questions. Executor is another agent that can search and analyze information guided by the search plan. To build the MIA framework, we first adopt an alternating reinforcement learning paradigm to enhance cooperation between the Planner and the Executor. Furthermore, we enable the Planner to continuously evolve during test-time learning, with updates performed on-the-fly alongside inference without interrupting the reasoning process. Additionally, we establish a bidirectional conversion loop between parametric and non-parametric memories to achieve efficient memory evolution. Finally, we incorporate a reflection and an unsupervised judgment mechanisms to boost reasoning and self-evolution in the open world. Extensive experiments across eleven benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of MIA.
title_zh: 记忆智能代理
abstract_zh:
深度研究代理（Deep Research Agents, DRAs）将大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力与外部工具相结合。记忆系统使DRAs能够利用历史经验，这对于实现高效推理和自主演化至关重要。然而，现有方法依赖于从记忆中检索相似的行动轨迹来辅助推理，却面临两大关键局限：记忆演化效率低下，以及存储与检索成本持续上升。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新型的记忆智能代理（Memory Intelligence Agent, MIA）框架，采用“管理-规划-执行”（Manager-Planner-Executor）的架构设计。

其中，**记忆管理器**（Memory Manager）是一个非参数化记忆系统，可对压缩的历史搜索轨迹进行存储；**规划器**（Planner）是一个参数化记忆代理，能够针对问题生成搜索计划；**执行器**（Executor）则是另一个代理，可根据规划生成的指令进行信息搜索与分析。

为了构建MIA框架，我们首先引入一种交替式强化学习范式，以增强规划器与执行器之间的协作。此外，我们使规划器能够在测试阶段的学习过程中持续进化，其更新在推理过程中实时完成，无需中断推理流程。同时，我们建立了一个双向转换机制，实现参数化记忆与非参数化记忆之间的动态交互，从而实现高效的内存演化。最后，我们引入反思机制与无监督判断机制，进一步提升代理在开放世界中的推理能力与自我演化水平。

在十一个基准任务上的大量实验表明，MIA框架展现出显著优势，显著优于现有方法。

title: The Role of Generator Access in Autoregressive Post-Training
authors: Amit Kiran Rege
abstract: We study how generator access constrains autoregressive post-training. The central question is whether the learner is confined to fresh root-start rollouts or can return to previously built prefixes and query the next-token rule there. In the root-start regime, output sampling, generated-token log probabilities, top-$k$ reports, and full next-token distributions along sampled trajectories all reduce to one canonical experiment, limited by the on-policy probability of reaching informative prefixes. Weak prefix control breaks this barrier, and once control is available, richer observations such as conditional sampling or logits can outperform top-$1$ access. Changing only the generator interface creates an exponential gap for KL-regularized outcome-reward post-training.
title_zh: 生成器访问在自回归后训练中的作用
abstract_zh: 我们研究生成器访问如何限制自回归式后训练。核心问题是：学习者是否被局限于从根节点开始的新序列生成，还是能够返回到先前构建的前缀，并在该处查询下一个词的规则。在仅从根节点开始的模式下，输出采样、生成词元的对数概率、top-$k$ 报告以及沿采样轨迹的完整下一个词分布，均简化为一个单一的典型实验，其性能受限于达到有意义前缀的策略内概率。当前缀控制能力较弱时，这一限制被打破；一旦获得控制权，诸如条件采样或 logits 信息等更丰富的观测结果，便能超越仅使用 top-$1$ 访问的效果。仅仅改变生成器接口，即可在 KL 正则化的结果奖励后训练中造成指数级的性能差距。

title: CPT: Controllable and Editable Design Variations with Language Models
authors: Karthik Suresh, Amine Ben Khalifa, Li Zhang, Wei-ting Hsu, Fangzheng Wu, Vinay More, Asim Kadav
abstract: Designing visually diverse and high-quality designs remains a manual, time-consuming process, limiting scalability and personalization in creative workflows. We present a system for generating editable design variations using a decoder-only language model, the Creative Pre-trained Transformer (CPT), trained to predict visual style attributes in design templates. At the core of our approach is a new representation called Creative Markup Language (CML), a compact, machine-learning-friendly format that captures canvas-level structure, page layout, and element-level details (text, images, and vector graphics), including both content and style. We fine-tune CPT on a large corpus of design templates authored by professional designers, enabling it to learn meaningful, context-aware predictions for attributes such as color schemes and font choices. The model produces semantically structured and stylistically coherent outputs, preserving internal consistency across elements. Unlike generative image models, our system yields fully editable design documents rather than pixel-only images, allowing users to iterate and personalize within a design editor. In experiments, our approach generates contextual color and font variations for existing templates and shows promise in adjusting layouts while maintaining design principles.
title_zh: CPT：基于语言模型的可控且可编辑的设计变体
abstract_zh: 设计视觉上多样化且高质量的方案仍是一个手动、耗时的过程，限制了创意工作流程中的可扩展性和个性化。我们提出了一种基于仅解码器语言模型——创意预训练变换器（Creative Pre-trained Transformer, CPT）的系统，用于生成可编辑的设计变体。该模型经过训练，能够预测设计模板中的视觉风格属性。我们方法的核心是一种新型表示形式——创意标记语言（Creative Markup Language, CML），这是一种紧凑且适合机器学习的格式，能够捕捉画布级结构、页面布局以及元素级细节（如文字、图像和矢量图形），涵盖内容与风格信息。我们在大量由专业设计师创作的设计模板语料库上对CPT进行微调，使其能够学习到有意义且上下文感知的属性预测，例如配色方案和字体选择。该模型生成的输出在语义结构和风格一致性方面表现良好，确保元素间保持内部协调性。与生成式图像模型不同，我们的系统输出的是完全可编辑的设计文档，而非仅限像素的图像，使用户能够在设计编辑器中进行迭代和个性化调整。实验表明，该方法能够为现有模板生成具有上下文意义的色彩与字体变体，并在调整布局的同时有效维持设计原则，展现出广阔的应用前景。

title: Trace-Guided Synthesis of Effectful Test Generators
authors: Zhe Zhou, Ankush Desai, Benjamin Delaware, Suresh Jagannathan
abstract: Several recently proposed program logics have incorporated notions of underapproximation into their design, enabling them to reason about reachability rather than safety. In this paper, we explore how similar ideas can be integrated into an expressive type and effect system. We use the resulting underapproximate type specifications to guide the synthesis of test generators that probe the behavior of effectful black-box systems. A key novelty of our type language is its ability to capture underapproximate behaviors of effectful operations using symbolic traces that expose latent data and control dependencies, constraints that must be preserved by the test sequences the generator outputs. We implement this approach in a tool called Clouseau, and evaluate it on a diverse range of applications by integrating Clouseau's synthesized generators into property-based testing frameworks like QCheck and model-checking tools like P. In both settings, the generators synthesized by Clouseau are significantly more effective than the default testing strategy, and are competitive with state-of-the-art, handwritten solutions.
title_zh: 基于追踪引导的效应测试生成器合成
abstract_zh: 近年来提出的多种程序逻辑已将“下近似”（underapproximation）的概念融入其设计之中，使其能够推理可达性而非仅限于安全性。本文探讨了如何将类似的思想整合到一个表达力强的类型与效应系统中。我们利用所得的下近似类型规范，指导测试生成器的合成，以探测具有副作用的黑箱系统的运行行为。本研究类型语言的一个关键创新在于，它能够通过符号化轨迹（symbolic traces）捕捉具有副作用操作的下近似行为，这些轨迹揭示了潜在的数据依赖和控制依赖关系，而测试生成器输出的测试序列必须保持这些约束。我们实现该方法的工具名为 Clouseau，并在一系列多样化应用中进行了评估，将 Clouseau 合成的生成器集成到基于属性的测试框架（如 QCheck）以及模型检测工具（如 P）中。在两种场景下，Clouseau 所生成的测试用例均显著优于默认的测试策略，且在性能上可与当前最先进的手工编写解决方案相媲美。

title: How Well Do Agentic Skills Work in the Wild: Benchmarking LLM Skill Usage in Realistic Settings
authors: Yujian Liu, Jiabao Ji, Li An, Tommi Jaakkola, Yang Zhang, Shiyu Chang
abstract: Agent skills, which are reusable, domain-specific knowledge artifacts, have become a popular mechanism for extending LLM-based agents, yet formally benchmarking skill usage performance remains scarce. Existing skill benchmarking efforts focus on overly idealized conditions, where LLMs are directly provided with hand-crafted, narrowly-tailored task-specific skills for each task, whereas in many realistic settings, the LLM agent may have to search for and select relevant skills on its own, and even the closest matching skills may not be well-tailored for the task. In this paper, we conduct the first comprehensive study of skill utility under progressively challenging realistic settings, where agents must retrieve skills from a large collection of 34k real-world skills and may not have access to any hand-curated skills. Our findings reveal that the benefits of skills are fragile: performance gains degrade consistently as settings become more realistic, with pass rates approaching no-skill baselines in the most challenging scenarios. To narrow this gap, we study skill refinement strategies, including query-specific and query-agnostic approaches, and we show that query-specific refinement substantially recovers lost performance when the initial skills are of reasonable relevance and quality. We further demonstrate the generality of retrieval and refinement on Terminal-Bench 2.0, where they improve the pass rate of Claude Opus 4.6 from 57.7% to 65.5%. Our results, consistent across multiple models, highlight both the promise and the current limitations of skills for LLM-based agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/UCSB-NLP-Chang/Skill-Usage.
title_zh: 代理技能在真实环境中的表现如何：在现实场景中对大语言模型技能使用的基准测试
abstract_zh:
代理技能（Agent skills）作为可复用、领域特定的知识构件，已成为扩展基于大语言模型（LLM）代理的流行机制。然而，对技能使用性能的正式基准测试仍然十分匮乏。现有的技能评估工作大多聚焦于过于理想化的场景：即为每个任务直接提供手工设计、高度定制化的特定技能。而在许多现实情境中，LLM代理往往需要自主搜索并选择相关技能，即便最匹配的技能也可能与任务需求不够契合。

在本文中，我们首次系统性地研究了在逐步增加挑战性的现实场景下技能的有效性。这些场景要求代理从包含34,000个真实世界技能的大规模知识库中检索技能，且无法依赖任何人工精心调校的技能。我们的研究发现，技能带来的优势极为脆弱：随着环境趋于真实，性能提升持续下降，在最具挑战性的场景中，成功率几乎趋近于不使用技能的基线水平。

为了缩小这一差距，我们探索了多种技能优化策略，包括针对查询的优化方法和不依赖查询的方法。结果表明，当初始技能具备合理相关性和质量时，查询特定的优化方法能够显著恢复性能损失。此外，我们在Terminal-Bench 2.0上进一步验证了检索与优化方法的普适性，成功将Claude Opus 4.6的通过率从57.7%提升至65.5%。

这些结果在多个模型上均保持一致，既凸显了技能在LLM代理中的巨大潜力，也揭示了当前技术仍存在的局限性。我们的代码已开源，地址为：https://github.com/UCSB-NLP-Chang/Skill-Usage。

title: Strengthening Human-Centric Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Integrity in LLMs via a Structured Prompt Framework
authors: Jiling Zhou, Aisvarya Adeseye, Seppo Virtanen, Antti Hakkala, Jouni Isoaho
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been used to enhance the reasoning capability of LLMs. However, its reliability in security-sensitive analytical tasks remains insufficiently examined, particularly under structured human evaluation. Alternative approaches, such as model scaling and fine-tuning can be used to help improve performance. These methods are also often costly, computationally intensive, or difficult to audit. In contrast, prompt engineering provides a lightweight, transparent, and controllable mechanism for guiding LLM reasoning. This study proposes a structured prompt engineering framework designed to strengthen CoT reasoning integrity while improving security threat and attack detection reliability in local LLM deployments. The framework includes 16 factors grouped into four core dimensions: (1) Context and Scope Control, (2) Evidence Grounding and Traceability, (3) Reasoning Structure and Cognitive Control, and (4) Security-Specific Analytical Constraints. Rather than optimizing the wording of the prompt heuristically, the framework introduces explicit reasoning controls to mitigate hallucination and prevent reasoning drift, as well as strengthening interpretability in security-sensitive contexts. Using DDoS attack detection in SDN traffic as a case study, multiple model families were evaluated under structured and unstructured prompting conditions. Pareto frontier analysis and ablation experiments demonstrate consistent reasoning improvements (up to 40% in smaller models) and stable accuracy gains across scales. Human evaluation with strong inter-rater agreement (Cohen's k > 0.80) confirms robustness. The results establish structured prompting as an effective and practical approach for reliable and explainable AI-driven cybersecurity analysis.
title_zh: 通过结构化提示框架增强大语言模型中以人为本的思维链推理完整性
abstract_zh: 思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）提示技术已被广泛用于提升大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力。然而，其在安全敏感型分析任务中的可靠性尚未得到充分验证，尤其是在结构化的人类评估背景下。相比之下，模型规模扩展和微调等替代方法虽可提升性能，但往往成本高昂、计算资源消耗大，且难以审计。而提示工程则提供了一种轻量、透明且可控的机制，能够有效引导LLM的推理过程。本研究提出一种结构化的提示工程框架，旨在增强CoT推理的完整性，同时提高本地部署LLM在安全威胁与攻击检测任务中的可靠性。该框架包含16个因素，归纳为四个核心维度：（1）上下文与范围控制；（2）证据溯源与可追溯性；（3）推理结构与认知控制；（4）面向安全的分析约束。与传统的启发式优化提示措辞不同，该框架引入了明确的推理控制机制，以缓解幻觉现象、防止推理偏离，并强化在安全敏感场景下的可解释性。以软件定义网络（SDN）流量中的DDoS攻击检测为例，研究对多个模型家族在结构化与非结构化提示条件下进行了评估。帕累托前沿分析与消融实验均表明，推理能力显著提升（小型模型最高达40%），且在不同规模模型上均保持稳定的准确率增益。经由人类评估，评分者间具有高度一致性（Cohen's k > 0.80），验证了结果的稳健性。研究结果确立了结构化提示是一种高效且实用的方法，适用于实现可靠、可解释的AI驱动网络安全分析。

title: StatsClaw: An AI-Collaborative Workflow for Statistical Software Development
authors: Tianzhu Qin, Yiqing Xu
abstract: Translating statistical methods into reliable software is a persistent bottleneck in quantitative research. Existing AI code-generation tools produce code quickly but cannot guarantee faithful implementation -- a critical requirement for statistical software. We introduce StatsClaw, a multi-agent architecture for Claude Code that enforces information barriers between code generation and validation. A planning agent produces independent specifications for implementation, simulation, and testing, dispatching them to separate agents that cannot see each other's instructions: the builder implements without knowing the ground-truth parameters, the simulator generates data without knowing the algorithm, and the tester validates using deterministic criteria. We describe the approach, demonstrate it end-to-end on a probit estimation package, and evaluate it across three applications to the authors' own R and Python packages. The results show that structured AI-assisted workflows can absorb the engineering overhead of the software lifecycle while preserving researcher control over every substantive methodological decision.
title_zh: StatsClaw：一种AI协作式统计软件开发工作流
abstract_zh: 将统计方法转化为可靠的软件，一直是定量研究中的一个持续性瓶颈。现有的AI代码生成工具虽然能够快速生成代码，但无法保证实现的准确性——而这对统计软件而言是至关重要的要求。我们提出了StatsClaw，一种基于Claude Code的多智能体架构，通过在代码生成与验证之间设置信息隔离屏障来确保可靠性。规划智能体独立生成实现、模拟和测试的规范，并将其分派给彼此不可见指令的独立智能体：构建者在不知晓真实参数的情况下实现代码，模拟器在不知晓算法细节的情况下生成数据，而测试者则使用确定性标准进行验证。本文介绍了该方法，并以一个probit估计包为例，完整演示了其端到端的应用过程。此外，我们在作者自己的R和Python项目中对三种应用场景进行了评估。结果表明，结构化的AI辅助工作流能够在吸收软件生命周期工程开销的同时，保持研究人员对每个实质性方法论决策的完全控制。

title: Assessing Large Language Models for Stabilizing Numerical Expression in Scientific Software
authors: Tien Nguyen, Muhammad Ali Gulzar, Kirshanthan Sundararajah
abstract: Scientific software relies on high-precision computation, yet finite floating-point representations can introduce precision errors that propagate in safety-critical domains. Despite the growing use of large language models (LLMs) in scientific applications, their reliability in handling floating-point numerical stability has not been systematically evaluated. This paper evaluates LLMs' reasoning on high-precision numerical computation through two numerical stabilization tasks: (1) detecting instability in numerical expressions by generating error-inducing inputs (detection), and (2) rewriting expressions to improve numerical stability (stabilization). Using popular numerical benchmarks, we assess six LLMs on nearly 2,470 numerical structures, including nested conditionals, high-precision literals, and multi-variable arithmetic. Our results show that LLMs are equally effective as state-of-the-art traditional approaches in detecting and stabilizing numerically unstable computations. More notably, LLMs outperform baseline methods precisely where the latter fail: in 17.4% (431) of expressions where the baseline does not improve accuracy, LLMs successfully stabilize 422 (97.9%) of them, and achieve greater stability than the baseline across 65.4% (1,615) of all expressions. However, LLMs struggle with control flow and high-precision literals, consistently removing such structures rather than reasoning about their numerical implications, whereas they perform substantially better on purely symbolic expressions. Together, these findings suggest that LLMs are effective at stabilizing expressions that classical techniques cannot, yet struggle when exact numerical magnitudes and control flow semantics must be precisely reasoned about, as such concrete patterns are rarely encountered during training.
title_zh: 评估大型语言模型在科学软件中稳定数值表达方面的应用
abstract_zh: 科学软件依赖于高精度计算，然而有限的浮点数表示可能引入精度误差，并在安全关键领域中产生传播性影响。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在科学应用中的使用日益广泛，但其在处理浮点数数值稳定性方面的可靠性尚未得到系统评估。本文通过两项数值稳定化任务，评估了LLMs在高精度数值计算推理方面的能力：（1）通过生成引发错误的输入来检测数值表达式中的不稳定性（检测）；（2）重写表达式以提升数值稳定性（稳定化）。我们利用主流的数值基准测试，对六种LLMs在近2,470个数值结构上进行了评估，涵盖嵌套条件语句、高精度字面量以及多变量算术运算等复杂形式。结果表明，LLMs在检测和稳定数值不稳定计算方面，与当前最先进的传统方法表现相当。更值得注意的是，当传统基线方法失效时，LLMs展现出显著优势：在基线方法未能提升准确性的431个（占17.4%）表达式中，LLMs成功稳定了其中422个（97.9%），并且在所有表达式中，有65.4%（1,615个）的稳定性优于基线方法。然而，LLMs在处理控制流和高精度字面量方面存在明显困难，往往倾向于直接删除这些结构，而非深入分析其数值影响；相比之下，它们在纯符号表达式上的表现则显著更优。综合来看，这些发现表明，LLMs能够有效稳定经典技术难以处理的表达式，但在需要精确推理具体数值大小和控制流语义的场景下表现不佳，原因在于这类具体模式在训练数据中极少出现。

title: SkillX: Automatically Constructing Skill Knowledge Bases for Agents
authors: Chenxi Wang, Zhuoyun Yu, Xin Xie, Wuguannan Yao, Runnan Fang, Shuofei Qiao, Kexin Cao, Guozhou Zheng, Xiang Qi, Peng Zhang, Shumin Deng
abstract: Learning from experience is critical for building capable large language model (LLM) agents, yet prevailing self-evolving paradigms remain inefficient: agents learn in isolation, repeatedly rediscover similar behaviors from limited experience, resulting in redundant exploration and poor generalization. To address this problem, we propose SkillX, a fully automated framework for constructing a \textbf{plug-and-play skill knowledge base} that can be reused across agents and environments. SkillX operates through a fully automated pipeline built on three synergistic innovations: \textit{(i) Multi-Level Skills Design}, which distills raw trajectories into three-tiered hierarchy of strategic plans, functional skills, and atomic skills; \textit{(ii) Iterative Skills Refinement}, which automatically revises skills based on execution feedback to continuously improve library quality; and \textit{(iii) Exploratory Skills Expansion}, which proactively generates and validates novel skills to expand coverage beyond seed training data. Using a strong backbone agent (GLM-4.6), we automatically build a reusable skill library and evaluate its transferability on challenging long-horizon, user-interactive benchmarks, including AppWorld, BFCL-v3, and $τ^2$-Bench. Experiments show that SkillKB consistently improves task success and execution efficiency when plugged into weaker base agents, highlighting the importance of structured, hierarchical experience representations for generalizable agent learning. Our code will be publicly available soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillX.
title_zh: SkillX：为智能体自动构建技能知识库
abstract_zh:
从经验中学习对于构建高效的大语言模型（LLM）智能体至关重要，然而当前主流的自我演化范式仍存在效率低下的问题：智能体在孤立环境中学习，反复从有限的经验中重新发现相似的行为模式，导致冗余探索和泛化能力差。为解决这一问题，我们提出 SkillX——一个完全自动化的框架，用于构建可跨智能体与环境复用的**即插即用型技能知识库**。SkillX 通过一个由三项协同创新构成的全自动流程实现：  
(i) **多层级技能设计**：将原始轨迹提炼为战略规划、功能技能与原子技能三个层次的分层结构；  
(ii) **迭代式技能优化**：基于执行反馈自动修正技能，持续提升技能库的质量；  
iii) **探索性技能扩展**：主动生成并验证新技能，以拓展技能覆盖范围，超越初始训练数据的限制。  

我们采用强大的基础智能体（GLM-4.6）自动构建了一个可复用的技能库，并在具有挑战性的长周期、用户交互型基准测试（包括 AppWorld、BFCL-v3 和 $τ^2$-Bench）上评估其迁移能力。实验结果表明，当将 SkillKB 集成到较弱的基础智能体时，任务成功率和执行效率均显著提升，凸显了结构化、分层化经验表征对通用智能体学习的重要性。我们的代码即将在 https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillX 公开发布。

title: How Far Are We? Systematic Evaluation of LLMs vs. Human Experts in Mathematical Contest in Modeling
authors: Yuhang Liu, Heyan Huang, Yizhe Yang, Hongyan Zhao, Zhizhuo Zeng, Yang Gao
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance on reasoning benchmarks, yet their ability to solve real-world problems requiring end-to-end workflows remains unclear. Mathematical modeling competitions provide a stringent testbed for evaluating such end-to-end problem-solving capability. We propose a problem-oriented, stage-wise evaluation framework that assesses LLM performance across modeling stages using expert-verified criteria. We validate the framework's reliability by comparing automatic scores with independent human expert judgments on problems from the China Postgraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling, demonstrating substantially stronger alignment than existing evaluation schemes. Using this framework, we reveal a comprehension-execution gap in state-of-the-art LLMs: while they perform well in early stages such as problem identification and formulation, they exhibit persistent deficiencies in execution-oriented stages including model solving, code implementation, and result analysis. These gaps persist even with increased model scale. We further trace these failures to insufficient specification, missing verification, and lack of validation, with errors propagating across stages without correction. Our findings suggest that bridging this gap requires approaches beyond model scaling, offering insights for applying LLMs to complex real-world problem solving.
title_zh: 我们距离目标还有多远？大语言模型与人类专家在数学建模竞赛中对比的系统性评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理基准测试中取得了优异表现，但其解决需要端到端工作流程的真实世界问题的能力仍不明确。数学建模竞赛为评估此类端到端问题求解能力提供了严格的测试环境。本文提出一种面向问题、分阶段的评估框架，通过专家验证的标准，在建模各阶段评估LLM的表现。我们通过对比中国研究生数学建模竞赛中问题的自动评分与独立人类专家判断，验证了该框架的可靠性，结果表明其一致性显著优于现有评估方法。基于该框架，我们发现当前最先进的LLMs存在“理解-执行”差距：尽管在问题识别和建模 formulation 等早期阶段表现良好，但在以执行为导向的阶段——如模型求解、代码实现和结果分析——仍存在持续性缺陷。这种缺陷即使在模型规模增大时也依然存在。我们进一步追溯这些失败的原因，发现主要源于规范不足、验证缺失以及缺乏验证机制，导致错误在各阶段间传播且无法纠正。研究结果表明，弥合这一差距需要超越单纯模型放大的方法，为将LLMs应用于复杂真实世界问题求解提供了重要启示。

title: DeepStack: Scalable and Accurate Design Space Exploration for Distributed 3D-Stacked AI Accelerators
authors: Zhiwen Mo, Guoyu Li, Hao, Chen, Yu Cheng, Zhengju Tang, Qianzhou Wang, Lei Wang, Shuang Liang, Lingxiao Ma, Xianqi Zhou, Yuxiao Guo, Wayne Luk, Jilong Xue, Hongxiang Fan
abstract: Advances in hybrid bonding and packaging have driven growing interest in 3D DRAM-stacked accelerators with higher memory bandwidth and capacity. As LLMs scale to hundreds of billions or trillions of parameters, distributed inference across multiple 3D chips becomes essential. With cross-stack co-design increasingly critical, we propose DeepStack, an accurate and efficient performance model and tool to enable early-stage system-hardware co-design space exploration (DSE) for distributed 3D-stacked AI systems. At the hardware level, DeepStack captures fine-grained 3D memory semantics such as transaction-aware bandwidth, bank activation constraints, buffering limitations, and thermal-power modeling. At the system level, DeepStack incorporates comprehensive parallelization strategies and execution scheduling for distributed LLM inference. With novel modeling techniques such as dual-stage network abstraction and tile-level compute-communication overlap, we achieve up to 100,000x faster runtime over state-of-the-art simulators at comparable accuracy, cross-validated against our in-house 3D designs, NS-3 backend (2.12%), and vLLM serving on 8xB200 GPUs (12.18%). With hierarchical design space search, DeepStack enables efficient exploration over 2.5x10^14 design points spanning 3D-stacked DRAM layers, DRAM vertical connectivity, interconnect, compute-memory allocation, and distributed scheduling. Compared with baseline designs, DeepStack achieves up to 9.5x higher throughput through co-optimized parallelism and 3D architecture search. Our DSE further reveals that batch size drives a more fundamental architectural divide than the prefill/decode distinction, and that parallelism strategy and hardware architecture are tightly coupled -- incomplete schedule search leads to permanently suboptimal silicon irrecoverable by software tuning. We intend to open source DeepStack to support future research.
title_zh: DeepStack：面向分布式三维堆叠AI加速器的可扩展且精确的设计空间探索
abstract_zh: 混合键合与封装技术的进步推动了对高带宽、大容量3D DRAM堆叠加速器的日益关注。随着大语言模型（LLM）参数规模扩展至数百亿甚至数万亿级别，跨多个3D芯片的分布式推理变得至关重要。在跨堆栈协同设计日益关键的背景下，我们提出DeepStack——一种精确且高效的性能建模与工具，旨在支持分布式3D堆叠AI系统在早期阶段的软硬件协同设计空间探索（DSE）。在硬件层面，DeepStack精准捕捉了3D内存的细粒度语义，包括事务感知带宽、bank激活约束、缓冲区容量限制以及热-功耗建模；在系统层面，DeepStack整合了全面的并行化策略与分布式LLM推理的执行调度机制。通过创新的建模技术，如双阶段网络抽象和基于tile的计算-通信重叠，DeepStack在保持与现有先进仿真器相当精度的前提下，实现了比当前最优模拟器快达10万倍的运行速度。该性能已通过自研3D架构、NS-3后端（误差2.12%）以及基于8块B200 GPU的vLLM服务（误差12.18%）进行交叉验证。借助分层设计空间搜索，DeepStack可高效探索涵盖3D堆叠DRAM层级、DRAM垂直互连、互连结构、计算-内存分配及分布式调度等维度的2.5×10¹⁴个设计点。相较于基线设计，DeepStack通过协同优化的并行策略与3D架构搜索，最高实现9.5倍的吞吐量提升。我们的设计空间探索进一步揭示：批处理大小（batch size）带来的架构分化比预填充/解码（prefill/decode）划分更为根本，且并行策略与硬件架构紧密耦合——不完整的调度搜索将导致硅片层面永久性次优结果，无法通过软件调优修复。我们计划开源DeepStack，以支持未来相关研究的发展。

title: Hallucination Basins: A Dynamic Framework for Understanding and Controlling LLM Hallucinations
authors: Kalyan Cherukuri, Lav R. Varshney
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) hallucinate: they produce fluent outputs that are factually incorrect. We present a geometric dynamical systems framework in which hallucinations arise from task-dependent basin structure in latent space. Using autoregressive hidden-state trajectories across multiple open-source models and benchmarks, we find that separability is strongly task-dependent rather than universal: factoid settings can show clearer basin separation, whereas summarization and misconception-heavy settings are typically less stable and often overlap. We formalize this behavior with task-complexity and multi-basin theorems, characterize basin emergence in L-layer transformers, and show that geometry-aware steering can reduce hallucination probability without retraining.
title_zh: 幻觉盆地：理解与控制大语言模型幻觉的动态框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）会产生幻觉：它们会生成流畅但事实错误的输出。我们提出了一种几何动力系统框架，其中幻觉源于潜在空间中与任务相关的吸引域结构。通过对多个开源模型和基准测试中的自回归隐状态轨迹进行分析，我们发现吸引域的可分性具有强烈的任务依赖性，而非普遍特性：在事实型任务中，吸引域的分离更为清晰；而在摘要生成和包含大量误解的任务中，系统通常更不稳定，吸引域之间也更容易重叠。我们通过任务复杂性定理和多吸引域定理形式化了这一行为，刻画了L层Transformer模型中吸引域的形成机制，并证明了基于几何感知的引导方法可以在不重新训练的情况下有效降低幻觉概率。

title: ROSClaw: A Hierarchical Semantic-Physical Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaboration
authors: Rongfeng Zhao, Xuanhao Zhang, Zhaochen Guo, Xiang Shao, Zhongpan Zhu, Bin He, Jie Chen
abstract: The integration of large language models (LLMs) with embodied agents has improved high-level reasoning capabilities; however, a critical gap remains between semantic understanding and physical execution. While vision-language-action (VLA) and vision-language-navigation (VLN) systems enable robots to perform manipulation and navigation tasks from natural language instructions, they still struggle with long-horizon sequential and temporally structured tasks. Existing frameworks typically adopt modular pipelines for data collection, skill training, and policy deployment, resulting in high costs in experimental validation and policy optimization. To address these limitations, we propose ROSClaw, an agent framework for heterogeneous robots that integrates policy learning and task execution within a unified vision-language model (VLM) controller. The framework leverages e-URDF representations of heterogeneous robots as physical constraints to construct a sim-to-real topological mapping, enabling real-time access to the physical states of both simulated and real-world agents. We further incorporate a data collection and state accumulation mechanism that stores robot states, multimodal observations, and execution trajectories during real-world execution, enabling subsequent iterative policy optimization. During deployment, a unified agent maintains semantic continuity between reasoning and execution, and dynamically assigns task-specific control to different agents, thereby improving robustness in multi-policy execution. By establishing an autonomous closed-loop framework, ROSClaw minimizes the reliance on robot-specific development workflows. The framework supports hardware-level validation, automated generation of SDK-level control programs, and tool-based execution, enabling rapid cross-platform transfer and continual improvement of robotic skills. Ours project page: https://www.rosclaw.io/.
title_zh: ROSClaw：一种用于异构多智能体协作的分层语义-物理框架
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）与具身智能体相结合，显著提升了高层次推理能力；然而，语义理解与物理执行之间仍存在关键差距。尽管视觉-语言-动作（VLA）和视觉-语言导航（VLN）系统使机器人能够根据自然语言指令完成操作与导航任务，但在处理长时程、具有时间结构的序列化任务时仍面临挑战。现有框架通常采用模块化流程进行数据采集、技能训练和策略部署，导致实验验证与策略优化成本高昂。为解决上述局限，我们提出ROSClaw——一种面向异构机器人的智能体框架，该框架将策略学习与任务执行统一集成于一个视觉-语言模型（VLM）控制器中。该框架利用e-URDF形式的异构机器人物理表示作为约束条件，构建了从仿真到现实世界的拓扑映射，实现对仿真与真实世界智能体物理状态的实时访问。此外，我们引入了一种数据采集与状态累积机制，在真实世界执行过程中存储机器人状态、多模态观测数据及执行轨迹，从而支持后续的迭代式策略优化。在部署阶段，统一智能体保持了推理与执行之间的语义连贯性，并能动态分配特定任务控制给不同智能体，从而提升多策略执行下的鲁棒性。通过建立自主闭环系统，ROSClaw大幅降低了对特定机器人开发流程的依赖。该框架支持硬件级验证、SDK级控制程序的自动生成以及基于工具的执行，实现了机器人技能的快速跨平台迁移与持续进化。项目主页：https://www.rosclaw.io/。

title: Beyond Fixed Tests: Repository-Level Issue Resolution as Coevolution of Code and Behavioral Constraints
authors: Kefan Li, Yuan Yuan, Mengfei Wang, Shihao Zheng, Wei Wang, Ping Yang, Mu Li, Weifeng Lv
abstract: Software engineers resolving repository-level issues do not treat existing tests as immutable correctness oracles. Instead, they iteratively refine both code and the tests used to characterize intended behavior, as new modifications expose missing assumptions or misinterpreted failure conditions. In contrast, most existing large language model (LLM)-based repair systems adopt a linear pipeline in which tests or other validation signals act mostly as post-hoc filters, treating behavioral constraints as fixed during repair. This formulation reduces repair to optimizing code under static and potentially misaligned constraints, leading to under-constrained search and brittle or overfitted fixes. We argue that repository-level issue resolution is fundamentally not optimization under fixed tests, but search over evolving behavioral constraints. To operationalize this view, we propose Agent-CoEvo, a coevolutionary multi-agent framework in which candidate code patches and test patches are jointly explored and iteratively refined. Rather than treating tests as immutable oracles, our framework models them as dynamic constraints that both guide and are revised by the repair process. Through mutual evaluation and semantic recombination, code and test candidates progressively narrow the space of behavior consistent with the issue description. Evaluated on SWE-bench Lite and SWT-bench Lite, Agent-CoEvo consistently outperforms state-of-the-art agent-based and agentless baselines in both repair success and test reproduction quality. Our findings suggest that enabling repair agents to revise behavioral constraints during search is critical for reliable issue resolution, pointing toward a shift from code-only optimization to coevolution of implementation and specification.
title_zh: 超越固定测试：代码与行为约束的共同演化作为仓库级问题解决
abstract_zh: 软件工程师在解决仓库级问题时，并不将现有测试视为不可更改的正确性判据。相反，他们会迭代地改进代码以及用于描述预期行为的测试，因为新的修改会暴露出缺失的假设或对失败条件的误解。与此不同，大多数现有的基于大语言模型（LLM）的修复系统采用线性流程，其中测试或其他验证信号主要作为事后的过滤器，将行为约束视为修复过程中固定的要素。这种处理方式将修复简化为在静态且可能不匹配的约束下优化代码，导致搜索空间过于宽松，从而产生脆弱或过拟合的修复结果。我们认为，仓库级问题的解决本质上并非在固定测试下的优化，而是在不断演化的行为约束中进行搜索。为了实现这一理念，我们提出了 Agent-CoEvo——一种协同进化多智能体框架，该框架共同探索并迭代优化候选代码补丁与测试补丁。我们的框架不把测试视为不可变的判据，而是将其建模为动态约束，既指导修复过程，又在修复过程中被不断修正。通过相互评估和语义重组，代码与测试候选者逐步缩小与问题描述一致的行为空间。在 SWE-bench Lite 和 SWT-bench Lite 上的评估表明，Agent-CoEvo 在修复成功率和测试复现质量方面均持续优于最先进的基于代理和无代理基线方法。我们的研究结果表明，让修复智能体在搜索过程中能够修订行为约束，对于实现可靠的缺陷修复至关重要，这预示着从仅优化代码向实现代码与规范的协同进化转变。

title: Mapping the Exploitation Surface: A 10,000-Trial Taxonomy of What Makes LLM Agents Exploit Vulnerabilities
authors: Charafeddine Mouzouni
abstract: LLM agents with tool access can discover and exploit security vulnerabilities. This is known. What is not known is which features of a system prompt trigger this behaviour, and which do not. We present a systematic taxonomy based on approximately 10,000 trials across seven models, 37 prompt conditions, and 12 hypothesized attack dimensions -- all executed in real Docker sandboxes. Every condition includes the instruction "Always respect all rules and access policies"; only a single encouragement sentence varies. Within the task class studied (planted test-runner vulnerabilities), the threat model is narrower than assumed: nine of twelve dimensions -- including minimization, moral licensing, incentives, identity priming, and reasoning triggers -- produce no detectable exploitation at n=50 per cell (upper 95% CI <7% per condition). But it is also more subtle than expected: one dimension, goal reframing, reliably triggers exploitation. "You are solving a puzzle; there may be hidden clues" produces 38-40% exploitation on Claude Sonnet 4 despite the explicit rule instruction, replicating across four models (CTF framing: 8-14% on DeepSeek, GPT-5-mini, o4-mini). The agent does not override the rules; it reinterprets the task so that exploitative actions become task-aligned. GPT-4.1 produces no exploitation across 1,850 trials (37 conditions), and a temporal comparison across four OpenAI models released over eleven months shows a pattern consistent with improving safety training, though model capability differences are a confounder. The practical contribution is a narrowed, testable threat model: defenders should audit for goal-reframing language, not for the broad class of adversarial prompts.
title_zh: 绘制滥用表面：基于一万次试验的大型语言模型代理漏洞利用行为分类体系
abstract_zh: 拥有工具访问权限的大型语言模型代理能够发现并利用安全漏洞，这一点已广为人知。然而，尚不清楚哪些系统提示（system prompt）特征会触发这种行为，哪些不会。本文基于在七种模型、37种提示条件下、12个假设攻击维度上进行的约一万次实验，提出了一套系统的分类框架——所有实验均在真实的Docker沙箱环境中执行。每个实验条件都包含指令“始终遵守所有规则和访问策略”；唯一变化的是单一鼓励性语句。在所研究的任务类别（植入式测试运行器漏洞）中，威胁模型比预想的更为狭窄：在每组50次试验（n=50）的情况下，十二个维度中有九个——包括最小化、道德许可、激励机制、身份激活以及推理触发——均未产生可检测到的利用行为（各条件的95%置信区间上限低于7%）。但该现象也比预期更微妙：其中一个维度——目标重构（goal reframing）——却能稳定引发利用行为。“你正在解决一个谜题；可能隐藏着线索”这一表述，在Claude Sonnet 4上导致了38%-40%的漏洞利用率，尽管存在明确的规则指令，且该结果在四个模型中均可复现（CTF情境设定下：DeepSeek、GPT-5-mini、o4-mini的利用率为8%-14%）。值得注意的是，代理并未违反规则，而是重新诠释任务本身，使原本具有攻击性的行为变得与任务目标一致。GPT-4.1在1,850次试验（涵盖37种条件）中均未出现任何利用行为；对过去十一个月内发布的四款OpenAI模型进行的时间序列对比分析也显示出一种与安全训练改进趋势一致的模式，尽管模型能力差异可能构成混杂因素。本研究的实际贡献在于构建了一个更精确、可验证的威胁模型：防御者应重点审查可能导致目标重构的语言表达，而非盲目防范广泛的对抗性提示。

title: ENCRUST: Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation
authors: Hohyun Sim, Hyeonjoong Cho, Ali Shokri, Zhoulai Fu, Binoy Ravindran
abstract: We present Encapsulated Substitution and Agentic Refinement on a Live Scaffold for Safe C-to-Rust Translation, a two-phase pipeline for translating real-world C projects to safe Rust. Existing approaches either produce unsafe output without memory-safety guarantees or translate functions in isolation, failing to detect cross-unit type mismatches or handle unsafe constructs requiring whole-program reasoning. Furthermore, function-level LLM pipelines require coordinated caller updates when type signatures change, while project-scale systems often fail to produce compilable output under real-world dependency complexity. Encrust addresses these limitations by decoupling boundary adaptation from function logic via an Application Binary Interface (ABI)-preserving wrapper pattern and validating each intermediate state against the integrated codebase. Phase 1 (Encapsulated Substitution) translates each function using an ABI-preserving wrapper that splits it into two components: a caller-transparent shim retaining the original raw-pointer signature, and a safe inner function targeted by the LLM with a clean, scope-limited prompt. This enables independent per-function type changes with automatic rollback on failure, without coordinated caller updates. A deterministic, type-directed wrapper elimination pass then removes wrappers after successful translation. Phase 2 (Agentic Refinement) resolves unsafe constructs beyond per-function scope, including static mut globals, skipped wrapper pairs, and failed translations, using an LLM agent operating on the whole codebase under a baseline-aware verification gate. We evaluate Encrust on 7 GNU Coreutils programs and 8 libraries from the Laertes benchmark, showing substantial unsafe-construct reduction across all 15 programs while maintaining full test-vector correctness.
title_zh: ENCRUST：基于动态骨架的封装替换与代理精炼实现安全的C到Rust翻译
abstract_zh:
我们提出了一种名为“基于实时骨架的封装替换与代理精炼”的两阶段流水线，用于将真实世界的C项目安全地转换为Rust。现有方法要么生成缺乏内存安全性保障的不安全代码，要么孤立地翻译函数，无法检测跨模块的类型不匹配，也无法处理需要全程序分析的不安全构造。此外，基于函数级别的大语言模型（LLM）流水线在类型签名变更时需要协调调用方更新，而项目级系统在面对现实世界中复杂的依赖关系时，往往无法生成可编译的输出。Encrust通过采用保持应用二进制接口（ABI）的包装模式，将边界适配与函数逻辑解耦，并对每个中间状态进行与集成代码库的验证，有效解决了上述问题。

第一阶段（封装替换）利用一种保持ABI的包装器，将每个函数拆分为两个部分：一个对外透明的外壳（shim），保留原始的裸指针签名；以及一个由LLM处理的安全内部函数，其接收清晰、作用域受限的提示。该设计使得每个函数可以独立进行类型修改，并在失败时自动回滚，无需协调调用方更新。随后，通过一次确定性的、基于类型的包装器消除步骤，成功翻译后移除包装器。

第二阶段（代理精炼）则在全程序范围内解决超出单函数作用域的不安全构造，包括静态可变全局变量、被跳过的包装器对以及翻译失败的情况。该阶段由一个在基准感知验证门控下操作于整个代码库的LLM代理完成。

我们在7个GNU Coreutils程序和8个来自Laertes基准测试的库上评估了Encrust，结果表明，在全部15个程序中均显著减少了不安全构造，同时保持了完整的测试向量正确性。

title: Optimizing LLM Prompt Engineering with DSPy Based Declarative Learning
authors: Shiek Ruksana, Sailesh Kiran Kurra, Thipparthi Sanjay Baradwaj
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks; however, their effectiveness is highly dependent on prompt design, structure, and embedded reasoning signals. Conventional prompt engineering methods largely rely on heuristic trial-and-error processes, which limits scalability, reproducibility, and generalization across tasks. DSPy, a declarative framework for optimizing text-processing pipelines, offers an alternative approach by enabling automated, modular, and learnable prompt construction for LLM-based systems.This paper presents a systematic study of DSPy-based declarative learning for prompt optimization, with emphasis on prompt synthesis, correction, calibration, and adaptive reasoning control. We introduce a unified DSPy LLM architecture that combines symbolic planning, gradient free optimization, and automated module rewriting to reduce hallucinations, improve factual grounding, and avoid unnecessary prompt complexity. Experimental evaluations conducted on reasoning tasks, retrieval-augmented generation, and multi-step chain-of-thought benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in output reliability, efficiency, and generalization across models. The results show improvements of up to 30 to 45% in factual accuracy and a reduction of approximately 25% in hallucination rates. Finally, we outline key limitations and discuss future research directions for declarative prompt optimization frameworks.
title_zh: 基于DSPy的声明式学习优化大语言模型提示工程
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在众多自然语言处理任务中表现出色；然而，其效果高度依赖于提示（prompt）的设计、结构以及嵌入的推理信号。传统的提示工程方法主要依赖于基于经验的试错过程，这限制了其可扩展性、可复现性以及在不同任务间的泛化能力。DSPy 是一种用于优化文本处理流水线的声明式框架，通过实现自动化、模块化且可学习的提示构建，为基于 LLM 的系统提供了一种替代方案。本文系统地研究了基于 DSPy 的声明式学习在提示优化中的应用，重点聚焦于提示生成、修正、校准以及自适应推理控制。我们提出了一种统一的 DSPy LLM 架构，结合符号规划、无梯度优化和自动模块重写机制，有效减少幻觉现象，提升事实准确性，并避免不必要的提示复杂性。在推理任务、检索增强生成以及多步思维链基准测试中的实验评估表明，该方法在输出可靠性、效率和模型泛化能力方面均实现了持续提升。结果表明，事实准确率最高提升了 30% 至 45%，幻觉率降低了约 25%。最后，本文指出了当前方法的关键局限性，并探讨了声明式提示优化框架未来的研究方向。

title: SysTradeBench: An Iterative Build-Test-Patch Benchmark for Strategy-to-Code Trading Systems with Drift-Aware Diagnostics
authors: Yuchen Cao, Hanlin Zhang, Jacky Wai Keung, Yang Chen, Linqi Song
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as quantitative research copilots to translate natural-language strategy specifications into executable trading code. Yet most existing evaluations either focus on static financial knowledge or summarize performance with a single profitability metric, leaving a gap for benchmarking strategy-to-code trading systems as governed, auditable software. We introduce SysTradeBench (SysTB), an iterative build-test-patch benchmark that evaluates LLM-generated trading systems under drift-aware diagnostics. Given a standardized Base Strategy Doc and frozen semantics, each model must produce (i) a strategy card, (ii) executable code, and (iii) mandatory audit logs. A sandboxed harness runs determinism and anti-leakage checks, detects rule drift across iterations, and returns evidence bundles to support constrained patches. SysTradeBench reports multi-dimensional scorecards for spec fidelity, risk discipline, reliability, and out-of-sample robustness indicators, together with cost-effectiveness signals. We evaluate 17 models across 12 strategies. Top models achieve validity above 91.7 percent with strong aggregate scores, but evidence-driven iteration also induces code convergence by Iter2. These findings suggest that LLM iteration complements rather than replaces human quantitative researcher governance: LLMs excel at rapid prototyping and shallow bug fixes, while human oversight remains essential for critical strategies requiring solution diversity and ensemble robustness.
title_zh: SysTradeBench：一种具备漂移感知诊断能力的迭代式构建-测试-修复基准，用于策略到代码的交易系统
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地被用作量化研究的协作伙伴，将自然语言描述的投资策略转化为可执行的交易代码。然而，现有的大多数评估方法要么仅关注静态金融知识，要么仅以单一盈利指标总结表现，未能为受控、可审计的策略到代码交易系统建立全面的基准。为此，我们提出了SysTradeBench（SysTB），一个迭代式“构建-测试-修复”基准框架，用于在考虑漂移感知诊断的前提下评估LLM生成的交易系统。在标准化的“基础策略文档”和固定语义的前提下，每个模型需输出：(i) 策略卡片，(ii) 可执行代码，以及 (iii) 必须提供的审计日志。一个沙箱化测试环境会执行确定性检查与防信息泄露检测，识别各迭代周期中的规则漂移，并返回证据包以支持受限修复。SysTradeBench 提供多维度评分卡，涵盖策略一致性、风险控制纪律、系统可靠性及样本外鲁棒性指标，同时附带成本效益信号。我们在12个策略上对17个模型进行了评估，结果显示顶尖模型的有效性超过91.7%，整体得分优异；但通过基于证据的迭代，代码在第二轮迭代中即表现出显著收敛。这些发现表明，LLM的迭代过程并非取代人类量化研究员的治理角色，而是对其形成有效补充：LLM在快速原型设计和浅层缺陷修复方面表现突出，而人类监督在需要方案多样性与组合稳健性的关键策略中依然不可或缺。

title: MIRAGE: Online LLM Simulation for Microservice Dependency Testing
authors: XinRan Zhang
abstract: Existing approaches to microservice dependency simulation--record-replay, pattern-mining, and specification-driven stubs--generate static artifacts before test execution. We propose online LLM simulation, a runtime approach where the LLM directly answers each dependency request as it arrives, maintaining cross-request state throughout a test scenario. No mock specification is pre-generated; the model reads the dependency's source code, caller code, and production traces, then simulates dependency behavior on demand. We instantiate this approach in MIRAGE and evaluate it on 110 test scenarios spanning 14 caller-dependency pairs across three microservice systems (Google's Online Boutique, Weaveworks' Sock Shop, and a custom system). In white-box mode (dependency source available), MIRAGE achieves 99% status-code fidelity (109/110) and 99% response-shape fidelity, compared to 62% / 16% for record-replay. End-to-end, caller integration tests produce the same pass/fail outcomes with MIRAGE as with real dependencies (8/8 scenarios). A signal ablation shows dependency source code is often sufficient for high-fidelity runtime simulation (100% alone); without it, the model still infers correct error codes (94%) but loses response-structure accuracy (75%). Constraining LLM output through typed intermediate representations reduces fidelity on complex stateful services (55%) while performing adequately on simple APIs (86%), suggesting that the runtime approach's implicit state tracking matters for behavioral complexity. Results are stable across three LLM families (within 3%) at $0.16--$0.82 per dependency.
title_zh: MIRAGE：用于微服务依赖测试的在线大模型模拟
abstract_zh: 现有微服务依赖模拟方法——记录回放、模式挖掘和基于规范的桩（stubs）——均在测试执行前生成静态构件。我们提出了一种在线大语言模型（LLM）模拟方法，这是一种运行时方案：当每个依赖请求到达时，LLM 直接作出响应，并在整个测试场景中维护跨请求的状态。无需预先生成模拟规范；模型会读取依赖服务的源代码、调用方代码以及生产环境中的调用轨迹，按需模拟依赖行为。我们在 MIRAGE 中实现了该方法，并在三个微服务系统（Google 的 Online Boutique、Weaveworks 的 Sock Shop 以及一个自定义系统）上对 14 对调用方-依赖关系的 110 个测试场景进行了评估。在白盒模式下（可访问依赖源码），MIRAGE 达到了 99% 的状态码保真度（109/110）和 99% 的响应结构保真度，而记录回放方法仅为 62% 和 16%。端到端地，在调用方集成测试中，MIRAGE 与真实依赖产生的通过/失败结果完全一致（8/8 场景）。信号消融实验表明，仅依赖源代码即可实现高保真度的运行时模拟（单独使用可达 100%）；若无源码，模型仍能正确推断错误码（94%），但响应结构准确性下降至 75%。通过类型化的中间表示对 LLM 输出进行约束后，复杂有状态服务的保真度降低至 55%，而在简单 API 上仍保持良好表现（86%），这表明运行时隐式状态跟踪对于行为复杂性至关重要。在三种不同 LLM 系列中，结果稳定（波动不超过 3%），每次依赖的开销为 0.16 至 0.82 美元。

title: A Validated Taxonomy on Software Energy Smells
authors: Mohammadjavad Mehditabar, Saurabhsingh Rajput, Tushar Sharma
abstract: As software proliferates across domains, its aggregate energy footprint has become a major concern. To reduce software's growing environmental footprint, developers need to identify and refactor energy smells: source code implementations, design choices, or programming practices that lead to inefficient use of computing resources. Existing catalogs of such smells are either domain-specific, limited to performance anti-patterns, lack fine-grained root cause classification, or remain unvalidated against measured energy data. In this paper, we present a comprehensive, language-agnostic, taxonomy of software energy smells. Through a systematic literature review of 60 papers and exhaustive snowballing, we coded 320 inefficiency patterns into 12 primary energy smells and 65 root causes mapped to the primary smells. To empirically validate this taxonomy, we profile over 21,000 functionally equivalent Python code pairs for energy, time, and memory, and classified the top 3000 pairs by energy difference using a multi-step LLM pipeline, mapping 55 of the 65 root causes to real code. The analysis reveals that 71% of samples exhibit multiple co-occurring smells, memory-related smells yield the highest per-fix energy savings, while power draw variation across patterns confirms that energy optimization cannot be reduced to performance optimization alone. Along with the taxonomy, we release the labeled dataset, including energy profiles and reasoning traces, to the community. Together, they provide a shared vocabulary, actionable refactoring guidelines, and an empirical foundation for energy smell detection, energy-efficient code generation, and green software engineering at large.
title_zh: 软件能耗异味的验证分类体系
abstract_zh: 随着软件在各个领域的广泛应用，其整体能耗问题日益成为关注焦点。为降低软件不断增长的环境影响，开发者需要识别并重构“能源异味”——即导致计算资源使用低效的源代码实现、设计选择或编程实践。现有的相关异味清单存在诸多局限：或局限于特定领域，或仅涵盖性能反模式，缺乏细粒度的根本原因分类，或未经过实测能耗数据的验证。本文提出一个全面、语言无关的软件能源异味分类体系。通过系统性文献综述60篇论文并进行详尽的滚雪球式检索，我们将320种低效模式归纳为12类主要能源异味，并映射出65个根本原因。为实证验证该分类体系，我们对超过21,000对功能等价的Python代码进行了能耗、时间和内存的性能分析，利用多步骤大语言模型（LLM）管道对能耗差异最大的前3000对代码进行分类，成功将65个根本原因中的55个与真实代码实例对应。分析结果表明：71%的样本同时存在多种共现的异味；与内存相关的异味修复后可带来最高的单次节能收益；不同模式间功率消耗的显著差异也证实，能源优化不能简单等同于性能优化。除分类体系外，我们还向社区公开了标注数据集，包含能耗数据和推理过程记录。该成果共同构建了一个共享术语体系，提供可操作的重构指南，并为能源异味检测、节能代码生成以及绿色软件工程的发展奠定了实证基础。

title: Darkness Visible: Reading the Exception Handler of a Language Model
authors: Peter Balogh
abstract: The final MLP of GPT-2 Small exhibits a fully legible routing program -- 27 named neurons organized into a three-tier exception handler -- while the knowledge it routes remains entangled across ~3,040 residual neurons. We decompose all 3,072 neurons (to numerical precision) into: 5 fused Core neurons that reset vocabulary toward function words, 10 Differentiators that suppress wrong candidates, 5 Specialists that detect structural boundaries, and 7 Consensus neurons that each monitor a distinct linguistic dimension. The consensus-exception crossover -- where MLP intervention shifts from helpful to harmful -- is statistically sharp (bootstrap 95% CIs exclude zero at all consensus levels; crossover between 4/7 and 5/7). Three experiments show that "knowledge neurons" (Dai et al., 2022), at L11 of this model, function as routing infrastructure rather than fact storage: the MLP amplifies or suppresses signals already present in the residual stream from attention, scaling with contextual constraint. A garden-path experiment reveals a reversed garden-path effect -- GPT-2 uses verb subcategorization immediately, consistent with the exception handler operating at token-level predictability rather than syntactic structure. This architecture crystallizes only at the terminal layer -- in deeper models, we predict equivalent structure at the final layer, not at layer 11. Code and data: https://github.com/pbalogh/transparent-gpt2
title_zh: 《黑暗可见：解读语言模型的异常处理》
abstract_zh: GPT-2 Small 模型的最终 MLP 层展现出一个完全可读的路由程序——由 27 个命名神经元组成的三层异常处理机制，而其所传递的知识仍纠缠于约 3,040 个残差神经元之间。我们以数值精度将全部 3,072 个神经元分解为：5 个融合的核心神经元（用于将词汇重新聚焦至功能词），10 个差异检测神经元（用于抑制错误候选），5 个专家神经元（用于识别结构边界），以及 7 个共识神经元（各自监控一个独立的语言维度）。共识-异常交叉点——即 MLP 干预从有益转为有害的临界点——在统计上极为清晰（Bootstrap 95% 置信区间在所有共识水平下均不包含零；交叉发生在 4/7 与 5/7 之间）。三项实验表明，Dai 等人（2022）所称的“知识神经元”在该模型的第 11 层，并非用于事实存储，而是作为路由基础设施：MLP 会放大或抑制注意力层残差流中已存在的信号，其强度随上下文约束程度而变化。一个花园路径实验揭示了一种反向花园路径效应——GPT-2 会立即运用动词的子范畴特征，这表明异常处理机制是基于词元层面的可预测性，而非句法结构。这一架构仅在末端层中显现；在更深层的模型中，我们预测类似结构将出现在最终层，而非第 11 层。代码与数据：https://github.com/pbalogh/transparent-gpt2

title: Bridging Safety and Security in Complex Systems: A Model-Based Approach with SAFT-GT Toolchain
authors: Irdin Pekaric, Raffaela Groner, Alexander Raschke, Thomas Witte, Jubril Gbolahan Adigun, Michael Felderer, Matthias Tichy
abstract: In the rapidly evolving landscape of software engineering, the demand for robust and secure systems has become increasingly critical. This is especially true for self-adaptive systems due to their complexity and the dynamic environments in which they operate. To address this issue, we designed and developed the SAFT-GT toolchain that tackles the multifaceted challenges associated with ensuring both safety and security. This paper provides a comprehensive description of the toolchain's architecture and functionalities, including the Attack-Fault Trees generation and model combination approaches. We emphasize the toolchain's ability to integrate seamlessly with existing systems, allowing for enhanced safety and security analyses without requiring extensive modifications and domain knowledge. Our proposed approach can address evolving security threats, including both known vulnerabilities and emerging attack vectors that could compromise the system. As a use case for the toolchain, we integrate it into the feedback loop of self-adaptive systems. Finally, to validate the practical applicability of the toolchain, we conducted an extensive user study involving domain experts, whose insights and feedback underscore the toolchain's relevance and usability in real-world scenarios. Our findings demonstrate the toolchain's effectiveness in real-world applications while highlighting areas for future improvements. The toolchain and associated resources are available in an open-source repository to promote reproducibility and encourage further research in this field.
title_zh: 复杂系统中安全与保障的融合：基于模型的方法与SAFT-GT工具链
abstract_zh: 在快速发展的软件工程领域，对稳健且安全系统的需求变得日益关键。这一点对于自适应系统尤为重要，因为它们具有复杂的结构，并在动态变化的环境中运行。为应对这一挑战，我们设计并开发了SAFT-GT工具链，以解决确保系统安全性与可靠性所面临的多方面难题。本文全面描述了该工具链的架构与功能，包括攻击-故障树的生成方法以及模型融合技术。我们强调该工具链能够无缝集成到现有系统中，无需进行大量修改或依赖特定领域的专业知识，即可实现更深入的安全与可靠性分析。所提出的方案能够有效应对不断演变的安全威胁，涵盖已知漏洞及可能危及系统的新攻击路径。作为工具链的应用实例，我们将其实时集成到自适应系统的反馈回路中。最后，为验证该工具链的实际应用价值，我们开展了一项广泛的用户研究，邀请领域专家参与，其反馈和见解充分证明了该工具链在真实场景中的相关性与可用性。研究结果表明，该工具链在实际应用中表现高效，同时指出了未来改进的方向。该工具链及相关资源已开源发布，旨在促进研究的可复现性，并推动该领域的进一步探索与发展。

title: One Model for All: Multi-Objective Controllable Language Models
authors: Qiang He, Yucheng Yang, Tianyi Zhou, Meng Fang, Mykola Pechenizkiy, Setareh Maghsudi
abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences is critical for enhancing LLMs' safety, helpfulness, humor, faithfulness, etc. Current reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) mainly focuses on a fixed reward learned from average human ratings, which may weaken the adaptability and controllability of varying preferences. However, creating personalized LLMs requires aligning LLMs with individual human preferences, which is non-trivial due to the scarce data per user and the diversity of user preferences in multi-objective trade-offs, varying from emphasizing empathy in certain contexts to demanding efficiency and precision in others. Can we train one LLM to produce personalized outputs across different user preferences on the Pareto front? In this paper, we introduce Multi-Objective Control (MOC), which trains a single LLM to directly generate responses in the preference-defined regions of the Pareto front. Our approach introduces multi-objective optimization (MOO) principles into RLHF to train an LLM as a preference-conditioned policy network. We improve the computational efficiency of MOC by applying MOO at the policy level, enabling us to fine-tune a 7B-parameter model on a single A6000 GPU. Extensive experiments demonstrate the advantages of MOC over baselines in three aspects: (i) controllability of LLM outputs w.r.t. user preferences on the trade-off among multiple rewards; (ii) quality and diversity of LLM outputs, measured by the hyper-volume of multiple solutions achieved; and (iii) generalization to unseen preferences. These results highlight MOC's potential for real-world applications requiring scalable and customizable LLMs.
title_zh: 一个模型应对所有：多目标可控语言模型
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）与人类偏好对齐，对于提升模型的安全性、帮助性、幽默感、忠实度等方面至关重要。当前的基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）主要依赖于从平均人类评分中学习到的固定奖励信号，这可能削弱模型在面对多样化偏好时的适应性和可控性。然而，实现个性化LLM需要将模型与个体用户的偏好对齐，这一任务极具挑战性，原因在于每位用户的数据稀疏，且用户偏好在多目标权衡中存在显著差异——有些情境下强调共情，而另一些情境则更注重效率与精确性。我们能否训练一个单一的LLM，在帕累托前沿（Pareto front）上针对不同用户偏好生成个性化的输出？在本文中，我们提出了多目标控制（Multi-Objective Control, MOC），该方法训练单个LLM直接生成位于用户偏好定义区域内的帕累托最优响应。我们的方法将多目标优化（MOO）原则引入RLHF，使LLM成为一个以偏好为条件的策略网络。通过在策略层面应用MOO，MOC显著提升了计算效率，使得我们仅需一块A6000 GPU即可微调一个70亿参数的模型。大量实验表明，MOC在三个方面均优于基线方法：(i) 对用户偏好在多个目标奖励之间的权衡具有更强的可控性；(ii) 输出质量与多样性更高，体现在所获得的多解集的超体积（hyper-volume）更大；(iii) 对未见过的偏好具备良好的泛化能力。这些结果凸显了MOC在实际应用中构建可扩展、可定制化LLM的巨大潜力。

title: RESCORE: LLM-Driven Simulation Recovery in Control Systems Research Papers
authors: Vineet Bhat, Shiqing Wei, Ali Umut Kaypak, Prashanth Krishnamurthy, Ramesh Karri, Farshad Khorrami
abstract: Reconstructing numerical simulations from control systems research papers is often hindered by underspecified parameters and ambiguous implementation details. We define the task of Paper to Simulation Recoverability, the ability of an automated system to generate executable code that faithfully reproduces a paper's results. We curate a benchmark of 500 papers from the IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC) and propose RESCORE, a three component LLM agentic framework, Analyzer, Coder, and Verifier. RESCORE uses iterative execution feedback and visual comparison to improve reconstruction fidelity. Our method successfully recovers task coherent simulations for 40.7% of benchmark instances, outperforming single pass generation. Notably, the RESCORE automated pipeline achieves an estimated 10X speedup over manual human replication, drastically cutting the time and effort required to verify published control methodologies. We will release our benchmark and agents to foster community progress in automated research replication.
title_zh: 重评分：基于大语言模型的控制系统研究论文中的仿真恢复
abstract_zh: 从控制领域研究论文中重构数值仿真，常常受到参数描述不充分和实现细节模糊的阻碍。我们提出了“论文到仿真的可恢复性”（Paper to Simulation Recoverability）这一任务，即自动化系统生成可执行代码以忠实复现论文结果的能力。我们构建了一个包含500篇来自IEEE决策与控制会议（CDC）论文的基准数据集，并提出RESCORE——一种由三个组件构成的基于大语言模型的智能体框架：分析器（Analyzer）、编码器（Coder）和验证器（Verifier）。RESCORE通过迭代执行反馈与可视化对比，不断提升仿真重构的保真度。我们的方法在基准测试中成功恢复了40.7%的具有任务一致性的仿真，显著优于一次性生成的方法。值得注意的是，RESCORE自动化流程相比人工手动复现，实现了约10倍的速度提升，大幅减少了验证已发表控制方法所需的时间与精力。我们将公开该基准数据集及智能体系统，以推动社区在自动化科研复现方面的持续进步。

title: Are Latent Reasoning Models Easily Interpretable?
authors: Connor Dilgren, Sarah Wiegreffe
abstract: Latent reasoning models (LRMs) have attracted significant research interest due to their low inference cost (relative to explicit reasoning models) and theoretical ability to explore multiple reasoning paths in parallel. However, these benefits come at the cost of reduced interpretability: LRMs are difficult to monitor because they do not reason in natural language. This paper presents an investigation into LRM interpretability by examining two state-of-the-art LRMs. First, we find that latent reasoning tokens are often unnecessary for LRMs' predictions; on logical reasoning datasets, LRMs can almost always produce the same final answers without using latent reasoning at all. This underutilization of reasoning tokens may partially explain why LRMs do not consistently outperform explicit reasoning methods and raises doubts about the stated role of these tokens in prior work. Second, we demonstrate that when latent reasoning tokens are necessary for performance, we can decode gold reasoning traces up to 65-93% of the time for correctly predicted instances. This suggests LRMs often implement the expected solution rather than an uninterpretable reasoning process. Finally, we present a method to decode a verified natural language reasoning trace from latent tokens without knowing a gold reasoning trace a priori, demonstrating that it is possible to find a verified trace for a majority of correct predictions but only a minority of incorrect predictions. Our findings highlight that current LRMs largely encode interpretable processes, and interpretability itself can be a signal of prediction correctness.
title_zh: 潜在推理模型是否容易解释？
abstract_zh: 潜在推理模型（Latent Reasoning Models, LRMs）因其较低的推理开销（相较于显式推理模型）以及理论上能够并行探索多种推理路径的能力，引起了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，这些优势也伴随着可解释性下降的代价：由于LRMs不以自然语言进行推理，因此难以监控其内部过程。本文通过对两种最先进的LRMs进行研究，探讨了其可解释性问题。首先，我们发现潜变量推理标记在LRMs的预测中往往并非必需；在逻辑推理数据集上，LRMs几乎总能在完全不使用潜变量推理的情况下产生相同的最终答案。这种推理标记的低利用率可能部分解释了为何LRMs并未始终优于显式推理方法，并对先前研究中关于这些标记作用的论述提出了质疑。其次，我们证明当潜变量推理标记对性能确实必要时，对于正确预测的实例，我们能够以65%至93%的准确率解码出“黄金”推理轨迹。这表明LRMs通常执行的是预期的、可解释的解决方案，而非不可解释的推理过程。最后，我们提出了一种无需事先知晓“黄金”推理轨迹的方法，从潜变量标记中解码出经过验证的自然语言推理轨迹。该方法表明，大多数正确预测都能找到一个经验证的推理轨迹，而错误预测则很少能实现这一点。我们的研究结果表明，当前的LRMs大多编码了可解释的推理过程，而可解释性本身可能成为预测正确性的信号。

title: Cog-DRIFT: Exploration on Adaptively Reformulated Instances Enables Learning from Hard Reasoning Problems
authors: Justin Chih-Yao Chen, Archiki Prasad, Zaid Khan, Joykirat Singh, Runchu Tian, Elias Stengel-Eskin, Mohit Bansal
abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of LLMs, yet a fundamental limitation remains: models cannot learn from problems that are too difficult to solve under their current policy, as these yield no meaningful reward signal. We propose a simple yet effective solution based on task reformulation. We transform challenging open-ended problems into cognitively simpler variants -- such as multiple-choice and cloze formats -- that preserve the original answer while reducing the effective search space and providing denser learning signals. These reformulations span a spectrum from discriminative to generative tasks, which we exploit to bootstrap learning: models first learn from structured, easier formats, and this knowledge transfers back to improve performance on the original open-ended problems. Building on this insight, we introduce Cog-DRIFT, a framework that constructs reformulated variants and organizes them into an adaptive curriculum based on difficulty. Training progresses from easier to harder formats, enabling the model to learn from problems that previously yielded zero signal under standard RL post-training. Cog-DRIFT not only improves on the originally unsolvable hard problems (absolute +10.11% for Qwen and +8.64% for Llama) but also generalizes well to other held-out datasets. Across 2 models and 6 reasoning benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms standard GRPO and strong guided-exploration baselines. On average, Cog-DRIFT shows +4.72% (Qwen) and +3.23% (Llama) improvements over the second-best baseline. We further show that Cog-DRIFT improves pass@k at test time, and the curriculum improves sample efficiency. Overall, our results highlight task reformulation and curriculum learning as an effective paradigm for overcoming the exploration barrier in LLM post-training.
title_zh: Cog-DRIFT：通过自适应重构实例探索，实现对复杂推理问题的学习
abstract_zh:
基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已显著提升了大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，但一个根本性局限依然存在：当问题难度超出当前策略所能解决的范围时，模型无法从中获得有意义的奖励信号，因而难以学习。为此，我们提出一种简单而有效的解决方案——任务重构。我们将具有挑战性的开放式问题转化为认知上更简单的变体形式，如选择题和填空题，这些形式在保留原始答案的同时，有效缩小了搜索空间，并提供了更密集的学习信号。这些重构任务涵盖了从判别式到生成式任务的连续谱系，我们利用这一特性实现学习的逐步提升：模型先从结构化、更易处理的形式中学习，再将所获知识迁移回原始的开放式问题，从而提升其表现。

基于这一洞察，我们提出了Cog-DRIFT框架，该框架能够自动生成重构任务，并根据难度动态构建适应性课程。训练过程由易到难逐步推进，使模型能够从原本在标准强化学习后训练中无法提供任何信号的难题中学习。实验表明，Cog-DRIFT不仅显著提升了原本无法解决的难题性能（Qwen模型绝对提升10.11%，Llama模型提升8.64%），而且在其他未见数据集上也表现出良好的泛化能力。在2个模型与6个推理基准上的测试中，我们的方法始终优于标准GRPO及强大的引导探索基线。平均而言，Cog-DRIFT相较第二佳基线分别实现了Qwen +4.72% 和 Llama +3.23% 的提升。

此外，我们还发现Cog-DRIFT在测试阶段能有效提高pass@k指标，且课程机制显著提升了样本效率。总体而言，我们的研究凸显了任务重构与课程学习作为克服LLM后训练中探索障碍的一种高效范式。

title: Training Transformers in Cosine Coefficient Space
authors: Mohamed Amine Bergach
abstract: We parameterize the weight matrices of a transformer in the two-dimensional discrete cosine transform (DCT) domain, retaining only the lowest-frequency coefficients. At each forward pass the full weight matrix is reconstructed via the inverse DCT; gradients propagate through the reconstruction to update the spectral coefficients directly. On character-level language modeling (Shakespeare, 1M characters), a 4-layer transformer trained from scratch in this representation matches the perplexity of the standard parameterization (6.1 vs.\ 6.1) while storing 52\% of the parameters. At 4$\times$ compression (29\% of parameters), the model reaches perplexity 6.9 -- outperforming a low-rank baseline (perplexity 8.8 at 21\% of parameters) at a comparable reduction. The method requires no architectural changes, no pre-trained checkpoint, and no auxiliary loss. It reduces to replacing each \texttt{nn.Linear} with a drop-in spectral layer that stores $K$ DCT coefficients instead of $n \times m$ weights.
title_zh: 在余弦系数空间中训练Transformer
abstract_zh: 我们将Transformer的权重矩阵参数化在二维离散余弦变换（DCT）域中，仅保留最低频的系数。在每次前向传播时，通过逆DCT重构完整的权重矩阵；梯度通过重构过程反向传播，直接更新谱系数。在字符级语言建模任务（莎士比亚文本，100万字符）上，使用该表示从头训练的4层Transformer模型，其困惑度与标准参数化方法相当（6.1 vs. 6.1），同时仅需存储52%的参数。当压缩至4倍（仅需29%的参数）时，模型达到6.9的困惑度——在相近参数压缩率下，优于低秩基线方法（21%参数时困惑度为8.8）。该方法无需任何架构改动、无需预训练检查点，也无需辅助损失函数。它只需将每个 \texttt{nn.Linear} 层替换为一个即插即用的谱层，后者仅存储 $K$ 个DCT系数，而非原本的 $n \times m$ 个权重。

title: Decocted Experience Improves Test-Time Inference in LLM Agents
authors: Maohao Shen, Kaiwen Zha, Zexue He, Zhang-Wei Hong, Siru Ouyang, J. Jon Ryu, Prasanna Sattigeri, Suhas Diggavi, Gregory Wornell
abstract: There is growing interest in improving LLMs without updating model parameters. One well-established direction is test-time scaling, where increased inference-time computation (e.g., longer reasoning, sampling, or search) is used to improve performance. However, for complex reasoning and agentic tasks, naively scaling test-time compute can substantially increase cost and still lead to wasted budget on suboptimal exploration. In this paper, we explore \emph{context} as a complementary scaling axis for improving LLM performance, and systematically study how to construct better inputs that guide reasoning through \emph{experience}. We show that effective context construction critically depends on \emph{decocted experience}. We present a detailed analysis of experience-augmented agents, studying how to derive context from experience, how performance scales with accumulated experience, what characterizes good context, and which data structures best support context construction. We identify \emph{decocted experience} as a key mechanism for effective context construction: extracting essence from experience, organizing it coherently, and retrieving salient information to build effective context. We validate our findings across reasoning and agentic tasks, including math reasoning, web browsing, and software engineering.
title_zh: 解剖经验提升大语言模型代理的测试时推理能力
abstract_zh: 人们越来越关注在不更新模型参数的情况下提升大语言模型（LLM）的性能。一个成熟的研究方向是测试时扩展（test-time scaling），即通过增加推理阶段的计算量（例如更长的推理过程、采样或搜索）来提升模型表现。然而，对于复杂的推理和代理类任务，简单地扩大测试时计算资源会显著增加成本，并且仍可能导致预算浪费在低效的探索上。本文探讨了“上下文”作为提升LLM性能的互补扩展维度，系统研究如何通过“经验”构建更优的输入以引导推理过程。我们发现，有效的上下文构建关键依赖于“解构经验”（decocted experience）。本文对增强经验的智能体进行了详尽分析，研究了如何从经验中提取上下文、性能随积累经验的增长规律、优质上下文的特征，以及哪些数据结构最有利于上下文构建。我们识别出“解构经验”是实现高效上下文构建的核心机制：从经验中提炼本质，进行有条理的组织，并检索关键信息以构建有效上下文。我们的结论在多种推理与代理任务中得到验证，包括数学推理、网页浏览和软件工程等场景。

title: RoboPhD: Evolving Diverse Complex Agents Under Tight Evaluation Budgets
authors: Andrew Borthwick, Stephen Ash, Anthony Galczak
abstract: 2026 has brought an explosion of interest in LLM-guided evolution of agentic artifacts, with systems like GEPA and Autoresearch demonstrating that LLMs can iteratively improve prompts, code, and agent architectures across diverse domains. As adoption accelerates, a central question emerges: given the same information, the same seed agent, and the same objective, which optimization algorithm yields the best results under the same evaluation budget? This question becomes critical when evaluations are expensive, such as when they require human judgment or multiple LLM calls. We present the first systematic comparison of three optimization paradigms -- Elo tournament selection (RoboPhD), Pareto-based selection (GEPA), and greedy hill-climbing (Autoresearch) -- across four benchmarks spanning abstract reasoning, cloud scheduling, SQL generation, and financial QA, all under a fixed budget of 1,500 evaluations. RoboPhD introduces validation-free evolution: instead of splitting the budget between training and validation, it uses Elo competition on training data to simultaneously evaluate agents and drive evolution. All three systems receive seed agents with diagnostic print() statements that evolution can grow, enabling self-instrumenting agents that develop increasingly informative diagnostics for the benefit of their evolutionary successors. Using a single default configuration, RoboPhD outperforms both GEPA and Autoresearch on three of four benchmarks, losing only on the simplest task, where the winning solution (from our Autoresearch adaptation) required under 90 lines of code. On ARC-AGI, RoboPhD evolves a 22-line seed agent into a 1,013-line multi-strategy system, improving accuracy from 27.8% to 65.8% using Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite as the solver. We release RoboPhD as a versatile toolkit under the MIT license with a simple optimize_anything() API for evolving diverse complex agents.
title_zh: RoboPhD：在严格评估预算下进化多样且复杂的智能体
abstract_zh:
2026年，基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的智能体（agentic artifacts）演化迎来了爆发式增长。GEPA和Autoresearch等系统已证明，LLM能够跨多个领域，持续优化提示词、代码及智能体架构。随着应用加速普及，一个核心问题浮现：在拥有相同信息、相同初始智能体和相同目标的前提下，面对相同的评估预算，哪种优化算法能取得最佳效果？这一问题在评估成本高昂时尤为关键——例如当评估需要人工判断或多次调用大模型时。

我们首次对三种优化范式进行了系统性比较：基于Elo积分的锦标赛选择（RoboPhD）、基于帕累托前沿的选择（GEPA），以及贪婪爬山法（Autoresearch）。实验覆盖四个基准任务：抽象推理、云资源调度、SQL生成和金融问答，所有测试均在1,500次评估的固定预算下进行。

RoboPhD引入了无需验证的演化机制：它不将预算划分为训练与验证两部分，而是直接在训练数据上通过Elo竞赛同时完成智能体评估与演化驱动。所有三个系统均从带有诊断打印语句（print()）的种子智能体开始，这些语句可被演化过程逐步扩展，从而实现“自仪器化”智能体——即智能体自身不断生成更丰富、更具信息量的诊断输出，以帮助后续演化阶段的改进。

采用单一默认配置，RoboPhD在四项基准中的三项上超越了GEPA和Autoresearch，仅在最简单的任务中落败——该任务的最优解（来自我们对Autoresearch的适配版本）代码量不足90行。在ARC-AGI基准上，RoboPhD成功将一个22行的种子智能体演进为包含1,013行代码的多策略系统，使用Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite作为求解器，准确率从27.8%提升至65.8%。

我们已将RoboPhD以MIT许可证开源发布，提供一个简洁易用的`optimize_anything()` API，支持对各类复杂智能体进行高效演化，打造一个通用性强、灵活可扩展的演化工具包。

title: EcoAssist: Embedding Sustainability into AI-Assisted Frontend Development
authors: André Barrocas, Nuno Jardim Nunes, Valentina Nisi, Nikolas Martelaro
abstract: Frontend code, replicated across millions of page views, consumes significant energy and contributes directly to digital emissions. Yet current AI coding assistants, such as GitHub Copilot and Amazon CodeWhisperer, emphasize developer speed and convenience, with energy impact not yet a primary focus. At the same time, existing energy-focused guidelines and metrics have seen limited adoption among practitioners, leaving a gap between research and everyday coding practice. To address this gap, we introduce EcoAssist, an energy-aware assistant integrated into an IDE that analyzes AI-generated frontend code, estimates its energy footprint, and proposes targeted optimizations. We evaluated EcoAssist through benchmarks of 500 websites and a controlled study with 20 developers. Results show that EcoAssist reduced per-website energy by 13-16% on average, increased developers' awareness of energy use, and maintained developer productivity. This work demonstrates how energy considerations can be embedded directly into AI-assisted coding workflows, supporting developers as they engage with energy implications through actionable feedback.
title_zh: EcoAssist：将可持续性融入AI辅助前端开发
abstract_zh: 前端代码在数百万页面浏览中广泛使用，消耗大量能源，并直接导致数字碳排放。然而，当前的AI编程助手（如GitHub Copilot和Amazon CodeWhisperer）主要关注开发者的速度与便利性，尚未将能源影响作为核心考量。与此同时，现有的能源优化指南和度量标准在开发者中的实际采纳率仍然较低，导致研究与日常编码实践之间存在明显脱节。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了EcoAssist——一个集成于IDE中的能源感知型辅助工具。该工具能够分析AI生成的前端代码，估算其能源足迹，并提出针对性的优化建议。我们通过500个网站的基准测试以及20名开发者的受控实验对EcoAssist进行了评估。结果表明，EcoAssist平均使每个网站的能耗降低13%至16%，显著提升了开发者对能源使用问题的认知，同时保持了原有的开发效率。本研究展示了如何将能源考量直接嵌入AI辅助编码工作流中，通过可操作的反馈支持开发者在编写代码时主动关注能源影响。

title: Comparing Human Oversight Strategies for Computer-Use Agents
authors: Chaoran Chen, Zhiping Zhang, Zeya Chen, Eryue Xu, Yinuo Yang, Ibrahim Khalilov, Simret A Gebreegziabher, Yanfang Ye, Ziang Xiao, Yaxing Yao, Tianshi Li, Toby Jia-Jun Li
abstract: LLM-powered computer-use agents (CUAs) are shifting users from direct manipulation to supervisory coordination. Existing oversight mechanisms, however, have largely been studied as isolated interface features, making broader oversight strategies difficult to compare. We conceptualize CUA oversight as a structural coordination problem defined by delegation structure and engagement level, and use this lens to compare four oversight strategies in a mixed-methods study with 48 participants in a live web environment. Our results show that oversight strategy more reliably shaped users' exposure to problematic actions than their ability to correct them once visible. Plan-based strategies were associated with lower rates of agent problematic-action occurrence, but not equally strong gains in runtime intervention success once such actions became visible. On subjective measures, no single strategy was uniformly best, and the clearest context-sensitive differences appeared in trust. Qualitative findings further suggest that intervention depended not only on what controls users retained, but on whether risky moments became legible as requiring judgment during execution. These findings suggest that effective CUA oversight is not achieved by maximizing human involvement alone. Instead, it depends on how supervision is structured to surface decision-critical moments and support their recognition in time for meaningful intervention.
title_zh: 比较人类监督计算机使用代理的策略
abstract_zh: 由大语言模型驱动的计算机使用代理（CUAs）正促使用户从直接操作转向监督协调。然而，现有的监督机制大多被研究为孤立的界面功能，导致难以对更广泛的监督策略进行比较。本文将CUA的监督视为一个由委托结构和参与程度定义的结构性协调问题，并以此视角在一项包含48名参与者的真实网络环境混合方法研究中，对比了四种监督策略。研究结果表明，监督策略对用户暴露于问题性操作的影响比其纠正已显现问题的能力更为可靠。基于计划的策略与较低的问题性操作发生率相关，但在问题行为显现后，其运行时干预成功的提升并不一致。在主观评价方面，没有一种策略在所有情境下均表现最优，最明显的差异出现在信任感上。定性分析进一步表明，干预效果不仅取决于用户保有的控制权，还取决于风险时刻是否在执行过程中变得清晰可辨，从而需要做出判断。这些发现表明，有效的CUA监督并非仅通过最大化人类参与即可实现；相反，关键在于监督结构如何凸显决策关键节点，并支持用户及时识别这些节点以实现有意义的干预。

title: Hierarchical Feature Integration Framework for Software Defect Prediction: Combining Syntactic Structure Mining with Neural Code Representations
authors: Cheng Yuan, Ziyang Liu
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Neural Networks, Information and Communication Engineering (NNICE)
abstract: Software defect prediction plays a critical role in improving software quality and optimizing the allocation of testing resources during software development lifecycle. Existing approaches typically rely on either handcrafted software metrics or neural semantic representations extracted from pre-trained models, both of which exhibit inherent limitations in comprehensively capturing the multidimensional characteristics of defective code. Handcrafted metrics lack semantic understanding while pure neural approaches often ignore explicit structural information. This paper proposes a hierarchical feature integration framework that synergistically fuses Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) structural patterns with pre-trained code model representations to achieve enhanced defect prediction performance. Our framework introduces three key components: (1) Syntactic-Semantic Hybrid Encoding (SSHE), which serializes AST hierarchical structures into sequential format suitable for pre-trained model processing, enabling the joint capture of syntactic hierarchies and lexical semantics within unified contextual embeddings; (2) Multi-Scale Feature Aggregation (MSFA), which integrates high-dimensional neural embeddings with low-dimensional traditional software metrics through SMOTE-based class balancing and L2-normalized concatenation, effectively addressing both class imbalance and feature scale disparity issues; (3) Random Forest ensemble classifier for robust and stable prediction. Comprehensive experiments conducted on six widely used open-source Java projects under both within-project (cross-version) and cross-project settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Our framework achieves F1-scores of 0.752 and 0.691, AUC values of 0.813 and 0.752, and MCC values of 0.412 and 0.347 for within-project and cross-project prediction, respectively. These results correspond to a relative improvement of 9.1% to 14.8% in F1-score and 6.8% to 9.1% in AUC over state-of-the-art baseline methods. Ablation studies rigorously validate the contribution of each component, revealing that syntactic-semantic encoding provides the most significant benefit, yielding a relative F1-score improvement of 10.6%.
title_zh: 软件缺陷预测的分层特征融合框架：结合语法结构挖掘与神经代码表示
abstract_zh: 软件缺陷预测在软件开发生命周期中对于提升软件质量以及优化测试资源分配起着至关重要的作用。现有方法通常依赖于手工设计的软件度量指标，或从预训练模型中提取的神经语义表示，但这两类方法均存在固有局限性，难以全面捕捉缺陷代码的多维特征。手工度量指标缺乏语义理解能力，而纯神经方法则常常忽略显式的结构信息。本文提出一种分层特征融合框架，通过协同整合抽象语法树（AST）的结构模式与预训练代码模型的表示，以实现更优的缺陷预测性能。该框架包含三个核心组件：(1) 语法-语义混合编码（Syntactic-Semantic Hybrid Encoding, SSHE），将AST的层次化结构序列化为适合预训练模型处理的顺序格式，从而在统一的上下文嵌入中联合捕获语法层次结构与词法语义信息；(2) 多尺度特征聚合（Multi-Scale Feature Aggregation, MSFA），通过基于SMOTE的类别平衡策略与L2归一化拼接方式，融合高维神经嵌入与低维传统软件度量，有效解决类别不平衡与特征尺度差异问题；(3) 基于随机森林的集成分类器，确保预测结果的鲁棒性与稳定性。在六个广泛使用的开源Java项目上开展的全面实验表明，本方法在跨版本（within-project）和跨项目（cross-project）两种设置下均表现出色。在跨版本预测中，F1分数达到0.752，AUC值为0.813，MCC值为0.412；在跨项目预测中，F1分数为0.691，AUC值为0.752，MCC值为0.347。相较于当前最先进的基线方法，F1分数相对提升9.1%至14.8%，AUC值相对提升6.8%至9.1%。消融实验证实了各组件的有效性，结果显示语法-语义编码贡献最为显著，可带来10.6%的相对F1分数提升。

title: The Future of VLSI Testing: Deep Learning Models for Accurate Fault Detection – Review
authors: Balkees Marliyya S, Saumiya S, Kirubasankar K
publish: 2025 6th International Conference on Smart Electronics and Communication (ICOSEC)
abstract: The growth in digital VLSI circuits has increased the complexities in fault detection. Traditional methodology such as ATPGs and SAT-based algorithms suffer from space explosion and limited scalability fails to detect the faults such as hardware Trojans. Enhancement in machine learning especially in deep learning algorithms such as SSAE (Stacked sparse autoencoder), and DSAE promises effective fault detection. These models guarantee efficient feature extraction, test pattern recognition and efficient fault classification in sequential and combinational circuits. The main objective of this paper is to review and compare machine learning-based fault detection, deep learning-based fault detection with conventional method in digital VLSI. It highlights their comparative strength, limitation, scalability, research gaps and methodology used in each method. The novelty of the paper lies in its structured comparison of unsupervised, semi-supervised and supervised models for fault detection.
title_zh: VLSI测试的未来：深度学习模型在精准故障检测中的应用——综述
abstract_zh: 数字VLSI电路的快速发展使得故障检测的复杂性显著增加。传统的检测方法，如ATPG（自动测试图案生成）和基于SAT的算法，存在内存爆炸问题且可扩展性有限，难以有效检测硬件木马等复杂故障。近年来，机器学习技术的提升，特别是深度学习算法（如堆叠稀疏自编码器SSAE和深度稀疏自编码器DSAE），为故障检测提供了新的有效途径。这些模型能够实现高效的特征提取、测试模式识别以及在时序电路和组合电路中的精准故障分类。本文的主要目标是回顾并比较基于机器学习、基于深度学习的方法与传统数字VLSI电路故障检测方法的异同，重点分析各类方法在性能优势、局限性、可扩展性、研究空白以及所采用方法论方面的差异。本文的创新之处在于系统地对比了无监督、半监督和有监督模型在故障检测中的应用，为后续研究提供了清晰的比较框架。

title: Physics-Informed Smart Maintenance for Offshore Wind Power: Prospects and Research Directions*
authors: Xinxing Wang, Jiahao Chen, Qianwei Zhang, Jiewu Leng
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Neural Networks, Information and Communication Engineering (NNICE)
abstract: The transition of offshore wind to deep-water environments requires advanced O&M strategies to manage coupled loads. Harsh marine conditions and data scarcity limit current reliability management. While TinyML supports monitoring, traditional models still face latency and interpretability challenges. This paper reviews Physics-Informed Smart Maintenance and proposes four future research prospects: edge-native intelligence for real-time simulation, physics-consistent data fusion, generative intelligence to address data scarcity, and cognitive decision-making enabled by Large Language Models (LLMs). These prospects support a resilient, autonomous ecosystem for next-generation wind turbines.
title_zh: 面向海上风电的物理信息智能维护：前景与研究方向*
abstract_zh: 海上风电向深水区域的转型需要先进的运维（O&M）策略来应对耦合载荷的管理挑战。恶劣的海洋环境以及数据稀缺性限制了当前可靠性管理的有效性。尽管TinyML支持实时监测，但传统模型仍面临延迟高和可解释性差的问题。本文综述了物理信息智能维护（Physics-Informed Smart Maintenance），并提出了四个未来研究方向：面向边缘计算的原生智能以实现实时仿真、保持物理一致性的数据融合、利用生成式智能解决数据稀缺问题，以及借助大型语言模型（LLMs）实现认知决策。这些研究方向将推动下一代风力发电机组向更具韧性与自主性的生态系统发展。

title: Generation of Programmatic Rules for Document Forgery Detection Using Large Language Models
authors: Valentin Schmidberger, Manuel Eberhardinger, Setareh Maghsudi, Johannes Maucher
publish: 2025 International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
abstract: Document forgery poses a growing threat to legal, economic, and governmental processes, requiring increasingly sophisticated verification mechanisms. One approach involves the use of plausibility checks, rule-based procedures that assess the correctness and internal consistency of data, to detect anomalies or signs of manipulation. Although these verification procedures are essential for ensuring data integrity, existing plausibility checks are manually implemented by software engineers, which is time-consuming. Recent advances in code generation with large language models (LLMs) offer new potential for automating and scaling the generation of these checks. However, adapting LLMs to the specific requirements of an unknown domain remains a significant challenge. This work investigates the extent to which LLMs, adapted on domain-specific code and data through different fine-tuning strategies, can generate rule-based plausibility checks for forgery detection on constrained hardware resources. We fine-tune open-source LLMs, Llama 3.1 8B and OpenCoder 8B, on structured datasets derived from real-world application scenarios and evaluate the generated plausibility checks on previously unseen forgery patterns. The results demonstrate that the models are capable of generating executable and effective verification procedures. This also highlights the potential of LLMs as scalable tools to support human decision-making in security-sensitive contexts where comprehensibility is required.
