title_zh: 基于大语言模型的文档伪造检测程序规则生成
abstract_zh: 文件伪造对法律、经济和政府流程构成了日益严重的威胁，亟需更加复杂的验证机制。一种应对方法是采用合理性检查（plausibility checks），即基于规则的程序，用于评估数据的正确性与内部一致性，以检测异常或篡改迹象。尽管这些验证程序对于保障数据完整性至关重要，但现有的合理性检查通常由软件工程师手动实现，耗时费力。近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码生成方面的进展为自动化并规模化生成此类检查提供了新的可能。然而，将LLMs适配到未知领域的特定需求仍面临重大挑战。本文研究了通过不同微调策略，在领域特定代码和数据上进行调整的LLMs，能否在资源受限的硬件条件下生成用于伪造检测的基于规则的合理性检查。我们对开源LLM模型Llama 3.1 8B和OpenCoder 8B在源自真实应用场景的结构化数据集上进行了微调，并在先前未见过的伪造模式上评估了生成的合理性检查。结果表明，这些模型能够生成可执行且有效的验证程序。这凸显了LLMs作为可扩展工具的巨大潜力，可在需要可理解性的安全敏感场景中辅助人类决策。

title: Lightweight Edge Intelligence: Adapting 1.5B LLM via LoRA for Log Analysis in Campus Networks
authors: Zhenpeng Li
abstract: The practical adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in cybersecurity remains constrained by computational cost, deployment complexity, and increasingly strict data-privacy requirements. These challenges are particularly acute in resource-limited environments such as vocational colleges and similar resource-constrained institutional environments, where cloud-based security analytics may be undesirable or infeasible, while traditional rule-based intrusion detection systems often struggle with noisy alerts and limited semantic understanding of network events. To address this gap, I propose Edge-SecGPT, an on-premise framework for lightweight log screening under constrained campus deployment conditions. Built on the Qwen2.5-1.5B backbone, Edge-SecGPT adopts parameter-efficient adaptation through Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) together with 4-bit NF4 quantization. Rather than targeting maximal model scale, the framework is designed for deployment on resource-constrained single-GPU edge-oriented hardware and operates as a task-restricted binary log-screening module for privacy-conscious campus-network analysis. To improve methodological rigor, I evaluate the framework using a stricter temporal file-holdout protocol, where one earlier log window is used for training, a subsequent window is used for validation, and a later unseen temporal holdout window is reserved for final evaluation. Across 32,762 desensitized campus log records, the revised study frames Edge-SecGPT as a localized lightweight LoRA-based log-screening framework together with a controlled serialization study under the stricter temporal file-holdout protocol and an additional same-protocol conventional baseline. On the later unseen temporal holdout, the conventional logistic-regression baseline achieved 77.96% precision, 98.48% recall, and 87.03% F1-score, with an estimated 826.5 false alarms/day. Under the same temporal split, the TinyLlama-1.1B LoRA baseline achieved 94.37% precision, 100.00% recall, and 97.10% F1-score, while the raw-JSON Qwen2.5-1.5B configuration achieved the strongest empirical performance among the compared configurations under the present single-site temporal-holdout protocol and current label-construction regime (94.68% precision, 100.00% recall, and 97.27% F1-score). The corresponding structured configuration achieved 93.81% precision, 99.18% recall, and 96.42% F1-score. These results suggest that serialization choice materially affects deployment behavior in the present within-site setting, while broader attack-semantic generalization remains to be validated.
title_zh: 轻量级边缘智能：通过LoRA适配15亿参数大模型用于校园网络日志分析
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLM）在网络安全领域的实际应用仍受限于计算成本、部署复杂性以及日益严格的隐私数据保护要求。这些挑战在资源有限的环境（如职业院校及其他类似条件受限的教育机构）中尤为突出：基于云的安全分析可能不理想或难以实施，而传统的基于规则的入侵检测系统则常因误报过多且对网络事件语义理解能力有限而表现不佳。为填补这一空白，我提出Edge-SecGPT——一种面向校园网络部署场景的本地化轻量级日志筛查框架。该框架基于Qwen2.5-1.5B模型架构，采用低秩适应（LoRA）技术实现参数高效微调，并结合4位NF4量化方法，旨在降低资源消耗。与追求模型规模最大化不同，本框架专为资源受限的单GPU边缘设备设计，作为任务限定的二分类日志筛查模块，服务于注重隐私保护的校园网络分析需求。

为提升方法论严谨性，本文采用更严格的时序文件留出评估协议：将较早的日志窗口用于训练，后续窗口用于验证，最晚的未见时间窗口保留用于最终评估。在32,762条脱敏后的校园日志记录上，修订后的研究将Edge-SecGPT定位为一个本地化、轻量级的基于LoRA的日志筛查框架，并在更严格的时序文件留出协议下开展受控序列化实验，同时引入同协议下的传统基准方法进行对比。在后期未见的时间留出窗口中，传统逻辑回归基线模型取得77.96%的精确率、98.48%的召回率和87.03%的F1分数，预计每日产生约826.5次误报。在相同时间划分条件下，TinyLlama-1.1B LoRA基线达到94.37%精确率、100.00%召回率和97.10% F1分数；原始JSON格式的Qwen2.5-1.5B配置在当前单站点时序留出协议及标签构建方式下表现最佳（94.68%精确率、100.00%召回率、97.27% F1分数），其结构化版本也取得了93.81%精确率、99.18%召回率和96.42% F1分数。

上述结果表明，在当前单站点设置中，序列化策略的选择显著影响模型的部署行为，但更广泛的攻击语义泛化能力仍有待进一步验证。

title: MaliVD: Source Code Vulnerability Localization via Attention-Based Multi-Modal Learning
authors: Enze Dai, Shuo Wang, Xi Xiao, Qing Li, Sheng Wen, Tianqing Zhu
publish: IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
abstract: Source code vulnerabilities represent a critical threat to software security, potentially leading to severe consequences such as data breaches and system failures. Traditional static analysis tools, while widely used, suffer from high false positive rates and struggle to adapt to the increasing complexity of modern software. Deep learning-based approaches hold promise for automated vulnerability detection, but they face challenges including limited dataset quality, inadequate feature extraction, and lack of precise vulnerability localization capabilities. To address these limitations, we propose MaliVD, a novel vulnerability detection method in source code that leverages a multi-modal attention mechanism. MaliVD not only identifies vulnerability types but also pinpoints the specific lines of code where vulnerabilities are triggered. The model extracts sequential, tree-based, and graph-based features from source code and employs specialized neural networks to learn these diverse representations. By strategically focusing on Points of Interest within the code, MaliVD effectively prioritizes potentially vulnerable code regions, enhancing both detection accuracy and localization precision. Experimental results show that when compared with eight advanced vulnerability detection models across three large datasets, MaliVD demonstrates superior vulnerability detection and localization capabilities, maintaining high F1 scores and localization precision. Particularly on the ReliVul dataset, the F1 score is improved by 21.82%, and the Top-5 localization accuracy is 18% higher than other methods, with lower false positives across six mainstream vulnerability types, validating MaliVD’s practical application value in real-world environments.
title_zh: MaliVD：基于注意力机制的多模态学习的源代码漏洞定位
abstract_zh: 源代码漏洞是软件安全中的一个关键威胁，可能导致数据泄露、系统崩溃等严重后果。传统的静态分析工具虽然应用广泛，但存在误报率高、难以适应现代软件日益复杂的结构等问题。基于深度学习的漏洞检测方法虽展现出自动化检测的潜力，但仍面临数据集质量有限、特征提取能力不足以及漏洞定位精度不高等挑战。为解决上述问题，本文提出一种名为MaliVD的新颖源代码漏洞检测方法，该方法采用多模态注意力机制，不仅能够识别漏洞类型，还能精确定位引发漏洞的具体代码行。MaliVD从源代码中提取序列化、树形结构和图结构等多种特征，并利用专用神经网络学习这些异构表示。通过有策略地关注代码中的关键区域（即“兴趣点”），MaliVD有效聚焦于潜在易受攻击的代码段，显著提升了漏洞检测的准确率与定位精度。实验结果表明，在三个大规模数据集上与八种先进漏洞检测模型进行对比，MaliVD在漏洞检测与定位方面均表现更优，保持了较高的F₁分数和定位精度。特别是在ReliVul数据集上，F₁分数提升21.82%，Top-5定位准确率高出其他方法18%，且在六类主流漏洞类型中均表现出更低的误报率，充分验证了MaliVD在真实应用场景中的实用价值。

title: CarbonWise CX: An Agentic AI Framework for Carbon-Aware Customer Support Analytics Using RAG and LLM-Based Code Generation
authors: B.M. Beena, Thotapalli Sri Surya Manideep, Sneha Saragadam, Sailesh Rathi, Ramaswamy Ramesh, Vijay Holimath
abstract: Organizations accumulate sufficient amounts of structured and unstructured customer support data, but current systems like SQL queries and fixed dashboards still generate actionable insights on a delay, increasing operational expenses, and inefficient use of cloud energies. This project aims at developing a cloud-native, agentic AI-driven analytics system that can be used to improve the decision-making processes of enterprises without violating the principles of green cloud computing. The proposed system is called CarbonWise CX, which incorporates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to perform qualitative reasoning, the dynamic generation of Python code, which entails the use of LLM when making quantitative decisions, and cloud-deployed versions that are scalable. The queries in natural language are handled via, agentic decision layer that automatically identifies which analytics workflow to choose. One of such innovations is the carbon-conscious cloud routing, the dynamic choice of the execution areas according to the current carbon intensity, with maintained latency and SLA limitations. The system with a deployed infrastructure on AWS EC2 will exhibit a 34.6 percent reduction in the number of carbon emissions per query in the operation using a modular architecture and on multi-region workloads simulated in the BAR. Also, 8,469 actual customer support records were analyzed resulting in 62.3 percent less manual tasks and 41.8 percent faster query response time than traditional workflows. The results of CarbonWise CX yield to achieve a better SLA compliance (29.5% of the significant improvement), to optimize cloud resource usage (36.7% of the significant improvement), and to minimize the work of the analyst (they were decreased significantly). The architecture shows how agentic AI and green cloud computing can provide intelligent and scalable, as well as environmentally friendly customer experience analytics. The article corresponds to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals SDG 12 (Responsible Consumption and Production), SDG 13 (Climate Action).
title_zh: CarbonWise CX：一种基于RAG与LLM代码生成的智能AI框架，用于碳意识客户支持分析
abstract_zh: 组织积累了大量结构化与非结构化的客户支持数据，但当前的系统（如SQL查询和固定仪表板）仍存在洞察生成延迟的问题，导致运营成本上升以及云计算资源的低效使用。本项目旨在开发一种云原生、基于智能体（agentic）AI驱动的分析系统，以提升企业决策效率，同时不违背绿色云计算的原则。所提出的系统名为CarbonWise CX，其核心功能包括：利用检索增强生成（RAG）技术实现定性推理；通过动态生成Python代码进行定量决策，借助大语言模型（LLM）完成复杂计算；并具备可扩展的云端部署能力。系统通过一个智能决策层处理自然语言查询，自动识别并选择最优的分析工作流。其中一项创新是“碳意识云路由”——根据实时碳强度动态选择执行区域，在保证延迟和SLA（服务等级协议）要求的前提下，实现低碳运行。在AWS EC2上部署的基础设施，采用模块化架构并在BAR（云环境模拟平台）中对多区域工作负载进行仿真，结果显示每查询碳排放量降低34.6%。此外，对8,469条真实客户支持记录的分析表明，该系统相较传统流程减少了62.3%的手动操作任务，查询响应时间加快了41.8%。CarbonWise CX的成果显著提升了SLA合规率（提高29.5%），优化了云资源利用率（提升36.7%），大幅减轻了分析师的工作负担。该架构展示了智能体AI与绿色云计算相结合，在提供智能、可扩展且环境友好型客户体验分析方面的巨大潜力。本研究契合联合国可持续发展目标SDG 12（负责任消费与生产）和SDG 13（气候行动）。

title: Hardware-Friendly Algorithm Optimization and Acceleration for 8K UHD Image and Video Broadcasting
authors: Hang Yuan, Wei Gao
abstract: Efficient implementation plays a critical role for real-time 8K Ultra-High-Definition (UHD) video broadcasting with the new generation video coding standards. Specifically, the more complex Coding Unit (CU) partitioning rules in new standards make it much more challenging to design efficient acceleration strategies. This paper proposes a light-weight hardware-friendly acceleration algorithm for CU partitioning, which is the bottleneck to implementing the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) based real-time intra codec for 8K video broadcasting on hardware platform. According to the CU partitioning rule, we first propose an novel One-Pass framework to determine CU split results, which can effectively reduce time complexity and hardware resources incurred by the original iterative decision process. Second, taking into account the characteristics of hardware platform, the efficient calculation methods based on Map-Reduce model and hardware-oriented optimizations are designed for gradient and histogram difference features required by our One-Pass framework. Finally, we design a reference hardware architecture to validate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm to support real-time 8K video broadcasting. Besides, a light-weight 8K UHD video dataset including diverse content is also provided to more reliably illustrate the coding performance of our algorithm. Experimental results show that our method is capable of the real-time CU division on Xilinx VU440 FPGA at 200 MHz, where the single-path can support 8K videos at 45 frames per second (fps), and 135 fps also can be achieved with multi-path parallelism. As far as we are aware, the proposed algorithm has attained state-of-the-art performance for the hardware-friendly acceleration of CU partitioning with the least loss in VVC standard.
title_zh: 面向硬件友好的8K超高清图像与视频广播算法优化与加速
abstract_zh: 高效实现对于新一代视频编码标准下实时8K超高清（UHD）视频广播至关重要。具体而言，新标准中更为复杂的编码单元（CU）划分规则使得设计高效的加速策略变得极具挑战性。本文提出了一种轻量级、硬件友好的CU划分加速算法，该算法旨在解决基于通用视频编码（VVC）的8K视频广播实时帧内编解码在硬件平台实现中的瓶颈问题。根据CU划分规则，我们首先提出一种新颖的一次遍历（One-Pass）框架，用于确定CU分割结果，该框架可有效降低原始迭代决策过程带来的时延复杂度和硬件资源开销。其次，结合硬件平台特性，针对一次遍历框架所需的梯度差与直方图差特征，设计了基于Map-Reduce模型的高效计算方法以及面向硬件的优化方案。最后，我们构建了一个参考硬件架构，以验证所提算法在支持实时8K视频广播方面的有效性。此外，我们还提供了一个轻量级的8K UHD视频数据集，包含多样化的视频内容，以便更可靠地评估算法的编码性能。实验结果表明，本方法可在Xilinx VU440 FPGA上以200 MHz频率实现实时CU划分，单路径可支持每秒45帧（fps）的8K视频处理，通过多路径并行处理更可达到135 fps。据我们所知，所提出的算法在VVC标准下实现了硬件友好型CU划分加速的最先进性能，且在编码质量损失最小的前提下达到了最优效果。

title: ExplainChain-SE: A Lightweight Benchmark for Explainable Debugging with Reasoning-to-Repair Alignment
authors: Ilia Sedoshkin
abstract: Many automated debugging tools can repair faulty code but often fail to explain why their fixes make sense. This reduces developer trust and limits our ability to study how reasoning connects to repair success. We introduce , a lightweight framework and benchmark that links short natural-language explanations to verified fixes across well-known bug–fix datasets which has three main components: a Bug Analyzer that identifies likely fault locations and suggests possible causes, a Fix Generator that applies small, rule-based edits and records a concise rationale, and a Verifier that checks whether the fix works and measures how closely the explanation matches the result. We evaluate on QuixBugs, Defects4J, and a CodeXGLUE refinement split (Bugs2Fix). The system outputs detailed logs containing the buggy code, the reference fix, the generated fix, the reasoning text, and validation scores. In experiments, generated repairs closely matched reference fixes on Bugs2Fix (mean ≈ 0.97) and Defects4J placeholders (mean ≈ 0.87), while QuixBugs showed moderate variation (mean ≈ 0.80) due to its diverse algorithms. All runs finished quickly and produced reproducible metrics and plots. By combining reasoning with verification, provides a transparent, reproducible foundation for explainable debugging. It is simple to extend with more datasets, richer test cases, or large language model–based fix generators, paving the way for deeper research into reasoning-aware program repair.
title_zh: ExplainChain-SE：一种具有推理到修复对齐的可解释性调试轻量级基准
abstract_zh:
许多自动化调试工具能够修复有缺陷的代码，但通常无法解释其修复为何合理。这降低了开发者的信任度，并限制了我们研究推理过程与修复成功率之间关系的能力。为此，我们提出了 ，一个轻量级框架与基准测试集，它将简短的自然语言解释与经过验证的修复结果关联起来，覆盖了多个知名的漏洞-修复数据集。该系统包含三个核心组件：一个**漏洞分析器（Bug Analyzer）**，用于识别可能的故障位置并提出潜在原因；一个**修复生成器（Fix Generator）**，通过小型规则化编辑应用修复，并记录简洁的修复理由；以及一个**验证器（Verifier）**，用于检查修复是否有效，并衡量解释与实际结果之间的匹配程度。

我们在 QuixBugs、Defects4J 以及 CodeXGLUE 的一个精炼数据集划分（Bugs2Fix）上进行了评估。系统输出详细的日志，包含原始错误代码、参考修复方案、生成的修复代码、推理文本及验证评分。实验结果显示，在 Bugs2Fix 上，生成的修复与参考修复高度一致（平均相似度 ≈ 0.97），在 Defects4J 的占位符修复中也表现良好（平均 ≈ 0.87），而 QuixBugs 因其算法多样性导致结果略有波动（平均 ≈ 0.80）。所有实验运行迅速，且生成的结果可复现，提供了可重复的度量指标和可视化图表。

通过将推理与验证相结合， 提供了一个透明、可复现的可解释调试基础。该框架易于扩展，支持接入更多数据集、更丰富的测试用例，或集成基于大语言模型的修复生成器，为深入探索“具有推理意识的程序修复”研究开辟了道路。

title: NLD-LLM: A systematic framework for evaluating small language transformer models on natural language description
authors: Hamed Jelodar, Mohammad Meymani, Parisa Hamedi, Tochukwu Emmanuel Nwankwo, Samita Bai, Roozbeh Razavi-Far, Ali A. Ghorbani
publish: 2025 International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
abstract: Natural Language Description (NLD) is a Natural Language Processing (NLP) task that requires models to generate structured and meaningful outputs from natural language inputs. In this work, we propose NLD-LLM, a systematic NLP framework to evaluate the performance of language models to generate accurate and concise source code descriptions. This framework incorporates a diverse set of transformer models, including Qwen, DeepSeek, Phi, LLaMA, and Mistral, spanning various sizes, architectures, and training approaches. Central to NLD-LLM is a comprehensive prompt design strategy that includes standardized formatting, clear task guidance, and NLD prompting, ensuring fair and consistent evaluation. Additionally, we apply an iterative refinement process to improve output’s quality and assess the model’s adaptability. Using semantic and structural metrics, our analysis demonstrates that prompt engineering significantly impacts the effectiveness of the model such that smaller models often performing competitively when supported by well-crafted prompts.
title_zh: NLD-LLM：一种用于评估小规模语言变换器模型在自然语言描述方面表现的系统性框架
abstract_zh: 自然语言描述（Natural Language Description, NLD）是自然语言处理（NLP）中的一项任务，要求模型从自然语言输入生成结构化且有意义的输出。在本研究中，我们提出了NLD-LLM——一种系统性的NLP框架，用于评估语言模型生成准确且简洁源代码描述的能力。该框架整合了多种Transformer模型，包括Qwen、DeepSeek、Phi、LLaMA和Mistral，覆盖了不同规模、架构及训练方法的模型。NLD-LLM的核心在于一套全面的提示设计策略，包含标准化格式、清晰的任务指引以及专为NLD任务优化的提示设计，从而确保评估过程的公平性与一致性。此外，我们还引入了迭代优化流程，以提升输出质量并检验模型的适应能力。通过语义与结构化指标进行分析，我们的研究表明，提示工程对模型性能具有显著影响，当配备精心设计的提示时，小型模型往往也能表现出与大型模型相媲美的竞争力。

title: Bridging Machine Learning and Generative AI for Intelligent Vulnerability Detection and Remediation in Source Code
authors: Atharva Deokar, Mayank Chauhan, Saur Deshmukh, Paarth Mahadik, Debjit Ghosal, Mahadev Balla, Megh Doshi, Shrey Dedhia, Sujal Chaudhari, Aniket Atole, Anant V. Nimkar
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Interdisciplinary Approaches in Technology and Management for Social Innovation (IATMSI)
abstract: Software vulnerabilities remain a major concern in modern development, where increasing code complexity and rapid release cycles make manual reviews and traditional static analysis insufficient. Existing automated approaches primarily focus on detecting vulnerabilities but rarely provide actionable, context-aware remediation, resulting in delayed patching and increased developer effort. To address this gap, this research proposes an AI-driven architecture that combines traditional machine learning with large language models (LLMs) for both precise detection and guided repair. The system employs an LSTM-based pipeline for accurate vulnerability localization and an LLM-based recommender module capable of generating targeted fixes and explanations. By constraining the LLM's operational scope, hallucinations are minimized and the reliability of recommendations improves. This hybrid architecture ultimately supports faster, more intelligent, and developer-centric vulnerability mitigation during the development phase.
title_zh: 将机器学习与生成式人工智能相结合，实现源代码中智能漏洞检测与修复
abstract_zh: 软件漏洞仍然是现代开发中的重大关切问题，随着代码复杂性的增加和快速发布周期的出现，人工审查和传统的静态分析已显得力不从心。现有的自动化方法主要集中在漏洞检测上，却很少提供可操作且具备上下文感知的修复建议，导致补丁延迟发布，增加了开发人员的工作负担。为弥补这一空白，本研究提出了一种基于人工智能的架构，融合传统机器学习与大型语言模型（LLMs），实现精准的漏洞检测与引导式修复。该系统采用基于LSTM的处理流程，以精确定位漏洞位置，并配备一个基于LLM的推荐模块，能够生成针对性的修复方案及解释说明。通过限制LLM的运行范围，有效减少了幻觉现象，提升了建议的可靠性。这一混合架构最终实现了在开发阶段更快速、更智能且以开发者为中心的漏洞修复支持。

title: Learning from Execution Graphs: A Graph Neural Network Approach to Malware Detection
authors: Hossein Shokouhinejad, Mackenzie Chase, Roozbeh Razavi-Far
publish: 2025 International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
abstract: The growing sophistication and scale of malicious software demand detection methods capable of capturing both the behavioral complexity and structural relationships in program execution. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have shown strong potential for malware detection by leveraging graph-structured representations such as Control Flow Graphs (CFGs), which preserve execution semantics and interdependencies between program components. When extracted dynamically, CFGs reflect actual runtime behavior, offering richer and more reliable information than static analysis alone. At the same time, GNN performance is sensitive to hyperparameter configurations, where suboptimal settings can lead to over-smoothing, reduced accuracy, or excessive computational cost. This paper presents a systematic study that combines the development of a GNN-based malware detection framework using dynamically extracted CFGs with a detailed analysis of hyperparameter sensitivity. We investigate the influence of model depth, hidden dimensions, learning rate, weight decay, and training epochs using two representative architectures, Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) and GraphSAGE. The findings provide empirical insights and practical guidelines for building powerful, efficient, and well-tuned GNN-based malware detection systems, with applicability to other graph classification domains.
title_zh: 从执行图中学习：一种基于图神经网络的恶意软件检测方法
abstract_zh: 日益复杂和庞大的恶意软件对检测方法提出了更高要求，亟需能够捕捉程序执行过程中行为复杂性与结构关系的检测手段。图神经网络（GNN）通过利用控制流图（CFG）等图结构表示，在恶意软件检测方面展现出巨大潜力。CFG能够保留程序执行的语义信息以及各组件间的依赖关系。当通过动态方式提取时，CFG能反映程序的实际运行行为，所提供的信息比仅依靠静态分析更为丰富且可靠。然而，GNN的性能对超参数配置极为敏感，不当的设置可能导致过平滑、准确率下降或计算开销过大。本文系统地研究了基于动态提取CFG的GNN恶意软件检测框架的构建，并深入分析了超参数的敏感性。我们以两种代表性架构——图卷积网络（GCN）和GraphSAGE——为例，考察了模型深度、隐藏层维度、学习率、权重衰减及训练轮数等因素的影响。研究结果为构建高效、强大且调优良好的GNN恶意软件检测系统提供了实证依据与实用指导，其方法亦可推广至其他图分类应用场景。

title: Automated UAV Controller Synthesis via LLM-Generated Control Logic and Particle Swarm Optimization
authors: Christopher Carr, Miguel Martínez-García, Benjamin James Marshall, Matthew Coombes, Eve Zhang
abstract: Large language models guided evolutionary frameworks for program synthesis have demonstrated strong results across combinatorial benchmarks; however, such frameworks have not been widely explored for robotic control systems. This article presents an automated framework for synthesizing control logic and optimizing numerical coefficients, enabling the deployment of generated controllers onto robotic platforms. To produce deployable controllers, the framework separates control logic synthesis from numerical parameter optimization, with controller coefficients optimized via particle swarm optimization using a Markov decision process reward signal. The resulting controllers are evaluated in a custom uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAV) simulation environment, validated using PX4 software-in-the-loop, and subsequently deployed on a physical UAV. Controller performance is evaluated on lemniscate and lissajous trajectory-tracking tasks and compared against proportional–integral–derivative with disturbance observer and linear quadratic regulator baselines. Across both trajectories, the framework-generated control law achieves improved tracking accuracy relative to the baseline controllers, with a minimum reduction in mean squared error of approximately 38% in real-world experiments. These results demonstrate the feasibility of deploying automatically synthesized control logic on a physical UAV, bridging automated program synthesis and real-world control deployment.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型生成控制逻辑与粒子群优化的无人机自主控制器合成
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型引导的进化框架在程序合成领域于组合基准测试中已展现出优异性能；然而，此类框架在机器人控制系统的应用尚未得到广泛探索。本文提出了一种自动化框架，用于合成控制逻辑并优化数值系数，从而实现生成控制器在机器人平台上的部署。为生成可部署的控制器，该框架将控制逻辑的合成与数值参数的优化相分离：控制器系数通过粒子群优化算法进行优化，并采用马尔可夫决策过程的奖励信号作为优化目标。所生成的控制器在自定义的无人飞行器（UAV）仿真环境中进行评估，经由PX4软件在环仿真验证后，最终部署于实际无人机平台上。控制器性能在lemniscate（双纽线）和lissajous（利萨茹）轨迹跟踪任务中进行了测试，并与比例-积分-微分结合扰动观测器（PID-DO）及线性二次型调节器（LQR）等基线方法进行了对比。在两种轨迹上，该框架生成的控制律均表现出优于基线控制器的跟踪精度，在真实实验中平均平方误差最小降低约38%。这些结果证明了自动合成控制逻辑在物理无人机上部署的可行性，成功实现了自动化程序合成与现实世界控制部署之间的桥梁。

title: Automating Root Cause Analysis in Semiconductor Manufacturing Using Transformer Models with Explainable AI
authors: Youssef Alothman, Mohamed Bader-El-Den, Lalit Maurya, Eslam Amer
abstract: Root Cause Analysis (RCA) is a critical step in diagnosing defects and preventing them in complex software and hardware systems. In practice, however, RCA is cumbersome and unstable, especially for high volumes of unstructured defect reports. This research considers the usage of transformer-based language models to automate and enhance RCA. Trained models, such as ELECTRA and RoBERTa, surpass traditional machine learning and deep learning methods in accuracy, enabling them to detect a wider range of defect types. Interpretability is achieved by post-hoc explanation of model predictions with SHAP, which consistently identifies key technical variables such as ”architecture,” ”memory leak,” and ”API failure.” These explanations increase confidence levels in model output decisions and make them more appropriate in real-world engineering applications. Overall, transformer models provide an open and scalable approach to automating RCA in high-volume, high-speed programs, overcoming challenges such as class imbalance and computational cost.
title_zh: 使用可解释人工智能的Transformer模型在半导体制造中实现根因分析自动化
abstract_zh: 根本原因分析（RCA）是诊断复杂软硬件系统缺陷并防止其再次发生的关键步骤。然而，在实际应用中，RCA过程往往繁琐且不稳定，尤其是在面对大量非结构化缺陷报告时更为明显。本研究探讨了基于Transformer的语言模型在自动化和增强RCA方面的应用潜力。经过训练的模型（如ELECTRA和RoBERTa）在准确率方面超越了传统的机器学习与深度学习方法，能够识别更广泛的缺陷类型。通过使用SHAP等事后解释方法对模型预测进行解释，可稳定地识别出关键的技术变量，如“架构问题”、“内存泄漏”和“API故障”。这些解释不仅提升了对模型输出决策的信心，也使其在实际工程应用中更具可信度和适用性。总体而言，Transformer模型为高吞吐量、高速度程序中的RCA自动化提供了一种开放且可扩展的解决方案，有效应对类别不平衡和计算成本高等挑战。

title: Java Code Generation Method Based on UML Class Diagrams and Large Language Model
authors: Linyun Cai, Yuandan Deng, Weiqin Chen, Bo Chen
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Neural Networks, Information and Communication Engineering (NNICE)
abstract: We propose an automatic Java code generation method that integrates UML class diagrams with large language models. First, we employ DOM4J parsing and FreeMarker templates to transform complex, tool-exported UML XML into a unified and concise XML representation. We then construct umltocode, a task-specific dataset of aligned UML XML and Java pairs, and fine-tune CodeLlama to perform direct UML-to-Java generation. Finally, we evaluate generation quality using a structural consistency-oriented scoring strategy. Experimental results indicate that fine-tuning substantially improves both code structure fidelity and semantic accuracy, enabling fast and reliable synthesis of high-quality Java source code from class diagram specifications.
title_zh: 基于UML类图与大语言模型的Java代码生成方法
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将UML类图与大型语言模型相结合的自动Java代码生成方法。首先，我们采用DOM4J解析和FreeMarker模板，将复杂且由工具导出的UML XML转换为统一、简洁的XML表示形式。随后，我们构建了一个面向任务的语料库——umltocode，其中包含对齐的UML XML与Java代码配对数据，并基于此对CodeLlama模型进行微调，以实现从UML到Java的直接生成。最后，我们采用一种以结构一致性为导向的评分策略来评估生成代码的质量。实验结果表明，微调显著提升了代码的结构保真度和语义准确性，从而能够快速、可靠地从类图规范中合成高质量的Java源代码。

title: SPI Enabled 64x8 SRAM Memory Design for Biomedical Applications
authors: Shivangi Mishra, M Chandu, Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Interdisciplinary Approaches in Technology and Management for Social Innovation (IATMSI)
abstract: In this paper, a Static Random Access Memory (SRAM) architecture with a 512-bit RAM is implemented, and verified together with a Serial Peripheral Interface (SPI) protocol. The design was realised using Cadence Virtuoso EDA tools of schematic capture, simulation, layout validation and carried out using 180 nm CMOS technology. The improved architecture employs a popular industry standard of serial communication, the SPI to coordinate memory access, such as read, write and control, as opposed to standard parallel SRAM modules. The architecture is a compact and energy-efficient memory system as SPI reduces the amount of pins significantly, interconnect complexity, and overall power consumption of 1.34 mW with a power-delay product (PDP) of 24.1 pJ. The design has been specifically optimized to suit the requirements of low-power applications with moderate access rates with low energy usage. Specifically, such a memory design can be applied to IoTbased environmental sensors, wearable computers, and batteryoperated embedded systems, in which energy efficiency is more important than high-speed access to data. Functional verification establishes the stability of the SRAM to the constraints of the SPI protocol, enabling the successful completion of all memory operations without any failure in the conditions of varying process variations in the 180nm CMOS. SPI-based interfacing of the microcontroller (MCU) not only eases microcontroller interfacing but also enables scalability to memory sizes that are larger, is a solid foundation for future developments of energyconscious battery-operated applications.
title_zh: 用于生物医学应用的SPI使能64x8 SRAM存储器设计
abstract_zh: 本文实现并验证了一种具有512位RAM的静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）架构，该架构与串行外设接口（SPI）协议协同工作。设计采用Cadence Virtuoso EDA工具完成原理图输入、仿真及版图验证，并基于180 nm CMOS工艺实现。所提出的改进型架构采用业界广泛使用的串行通信标准——SPI，以协调内存访问操作（如读取、写入和控制），区别于传统的并行SRAM模块。该架构具有紧凑性与高能效特点，由于SPI显著减少了引脚数量、互连复杂度，并将整体功耗降低至1.34 mW，同时具备24.1 pJ的功耗延迟乘积（PDP）。该设计特别优化以满足低功耗应用中对中等访问速率和极低能耗的需求。具体而言，此类存储器设计适用于基于物联网的环境传感器、可穿戴计算机以及电池供电的嵌入式系统，在这些场景中，能效比高速数据访问更为重要。功能验证表明，SRAM在180 nm CMOS工艺下，面对不同工艺波动时仍能稳定运行，成功完成所有内存操作且无任何故障。通过MCU基于SPI的接口方式，不仅简化了微控制器的连接，还为未来扩展更大容量存储提供了良好基础，是面向节能型电池供电应用的重要技术支撑。
